longDescription: In Wild Rides WaterPark Factory, you get the chance to build your very own waterpark of your dreams. Make sure you build your waterpark with gravity-defying loops, crazy twists and turns, and screaming speeds. You'll get the chance to have your guests test the rides so you can make adjustments if necessary. Do whatever it takes to make them happy and scream with excitement.   Wild Rides WaterPark Factory gives you the tools to create a wide variety of ride experiences for your guests. It is fun, colorful and addictive gameplay that will test your fun-factor building skills. Monitor overall ride times, top speed, ride length and the fun-factor, and depending upon your feedback from the riders, make customized additions. You'll be able to add greater height by adding more straight-a-ways, steeper or more shallow turns, twistier-twists and more stomach-lurching drops.
Use this $15 download card for the Best Buy Digital Music Store to stock up on your favorite tunes or give a gift any music enthusiast is sure to love.

MATURE 17+  Blood, Strong Lyrics, Violence Gear up for the most intense fighting action on the planet. Pride FC combines real fighters with real fighting styles like Muay Thai, Jujitsu, Karate and more for an extraordinarily realistic mixed martial arts fighting experience. Get into the ring with some of the best fighters in the world and hone your strategy for devastating one-hit knockouts, match-ending submissions and jaw-shattering combos.   You can choose from more than 20 fierce fighters each with their own fighting style, strengths and weaknesses. Master each fighter's style and defeat your opponents with swift fury. You'll watch it all go down in an awesome television-style presentation complete with announcers, round girls, pyrotechnics and realistic camera angles. This game offers some of the most intense and realistic fighting action in the world.

EVERYONE No Descriptors If you've always wanted to take on the legendary greats of the golf course, Tiger Woods PGA Tour 06 is your chance to do just that. Head into prime competition and challenge golf's greatest players to see who comes out on top. Go head-to-head with the celebrated prowess of Jack Nicklaus or walk the greens with Tiger Woods on some of the most breathtaking courses you've ever seen. From Pebble Beach to Reflection Bay, you'll play the toughest golfers on the most grueling courses without even breaking a sweat.  This latest version in the Tiger Woods PGA Tour series lets you experience the highs and lows of life as a professional golfer, as you make your way from Q School to the big-time tournaments. The new TrueSwing Putt Analyzer and the addition of practice swings help you refine and improve your skills. Go up against different PGA players, including Chris DiMarco, Mike Weir, Ian Poulter and Luke Donald for an experience you won't soon forget.
The Stereo RFU Adapter provides you with enhanced stereo sound cables that connect your PlayStation 2 to your television.
Giving  or getting  the gift of gaming is easy with this handheld, game and accessory-packed bundle.  Includes: PSP handheld, PSP Starter Kit and Madden NFL 06

Whether you're creating an immersive 3D scene for a presentation, touching up your latest vacation photos or designing an attention-grabbing logo for your business, Adobe Photoshop CS6 Extended delivers the intuitive toolset you need to achieve your desired results. Stop searching through menus to find the effect you're looking for, and take advantage of Photoshop CS6 Extended's automatic corrections to quickly retouch or enhance your images. With the modern interface with dark background options, this software allows your photos to pop off the screen while hundreds of design touches help provide a smoother editing experience. Are you ready to extend your creativity?  Adobe Photoshop CS6 Extended lets you express your creativity through the powerful image creation, editing and enhancement tools of this software. Featuring all of the photo-editing magic of Photoshop CS6 plus 3D graphic design and image analysis tools, Adobe Photoshop CS6 Extended helps you fully realize your creative potential by allowing you to produce dynamic images and videos. Use the precise editing controls to touch up your photos quickly, correct lens curvatures, draw naturally with a variety of paint tools and more. Remove unwanted objects from your images and watch as the new Content-Aware Patch feature automatically fills in the missing area. Enjoy swift performance and speedy imaging tasks and processing with Mercury Graphics Engine and 64-bit support. Create stunning 3D artwork with a simple interface that allows you to enhance the scene with shadows, lighting and animation. With the array of new tools, video and raw file support, automatic image corrections and more, Adobe Photoshop CS6 Extended adds new dimensions to digital imaging.
Ensure that you get the most out of your new custom car stereo system with this high-quality wire harness.

Give your memories the presentation they deserve with this cost-saving digital photo frame package. It includes a Kodak 8" LCD frame with built-in speakers, plus a 2GB Secure Digital (SD) memory card for storing scores of your favorite images. Save $40.00 when you buy this discounted package.

Learn more about Xbox 360 Universal Media Remote. (Flash demo) Harness the power of your next generation gaming console with this Universal Media Remote designed exclusively for your Xbox 360. The ergonomic design fits the contours of your hands for easy operation and quick access to controls. Special backlit buttons are easy to identify even in low- and no-light situations.  The Media Remote is also a universal TV remote allowing you to interface with your television via one simple device, helping reduce the number of controllers you need to access your electronics. Additionally, the inclusion of Windows XP Media Center controls gives you access to all your media for a totally integrated entertainment experience. You'll also be able to control your favorite movies using the remote's DVD playback functions.
Bask in the glow of your favorite team with this Tiffany-style lamp, which features a hand-cut glass shade that is hand-painted with the team colors and logo for a distinctive accent.

SynopsisThe tranquility of this island's existence is shattered with the rise of the corrupt El Presidente, who will stop at nothing to bring the entire island under his despotic thumb. As his forces advance, the island people face violence and destruction on an unprecedented scale. Now it's up to you to take the controls of a combat helicopter and face off against El Presidente's forces, using all the firepower at your command to repel them and protect the island residents.  Prepare to push yourself and your machinery to the limit in Helicopter Strike Force. Complete 18 thrilling combat missions, many with multiple objectives, as you soar in your bird through fully destructible 3D environments. An arsenal of weapons offers you numerous choices as to the best way to dispatch your enemies. Go head-to-head with other pilots online to prove who has the skills to command the air and destroy the advancing forces.

This HDTV features Wide Color Enhancer Plus technology that delivers brilliant colors for detailed images when watching your favorite TV shows, movies or sporting events. Two 10W speakers with Dolby Digital and DTS decoders provide a lush soundscape.  This product has been refurbished.  Learn more.

This HDTV features a 5 ms response time for smooth transitions between fast action scenes, so you can enjoy your favorite movies, TV shows or sports. The wide 178° viewing angles help ensure that every seat in the room is a good one.

EVERYONE 10+ Animated Blood, Fantasy Violence Imagine if a widespread plague were to appear on the shores of our homeland. Would we have the resources necessary to inhibit its far-reaching powers? Or, would we cease to exist as a result of its stranglehold? Now, imagine if just 48 hours ago, you received a distress signal from a remote research lab studying a virulent organism identified as the Scurge. Top scientists have been examining its remarkable metamorphic capabilities, and they fear without an immediate plan of action, the results could be catastrophic. In this chilling, yet enthralling campaign, the world's worst fears are realized. Not only are you susceptible to this disastrous strain, you're the single person who can stop its spread.   As Jenosa Arma, a venerated bounty hunter, you've been commissioned by a black-ops government cell to investigate and salvage research technology within the facility that may help combat the deadly Scurge. Armed with top-secret projectile gauntlets and a prototype battle suit, you must put your fears aside and accept this daunting call to action. Resist the Scurge, or perish in your valiant efforts.

Rev up your car's interior. This receiver gives you the power to upload images and video clips to the 3D display, so your deck looks as good as it sounds.  Efficient MOSFET amplifier delivers 50 watts peak power (20 watts RMS) x 4 channels  Sirius-Ready: includes controls and display capability for optional Sirius Satellite Radio systems (tuner, antenna and subscription required for activation)  PICT technology lets you download images, video clips and screensavers from your computer, burn them to CD and upload them to your receiver
This digital camera features image stabilization and face detection technology for capturing special moments in clear, detailed images. The mini USB port provides an easy connection to your computer.

Hot days are easier with the ice and water dispenser in the door of this refrigerator always ready to fill your glass with cold water and ice. The Accu-Chill system ensures your food remains at the right temperature, too.

Snipe, sneak or blaze away with this Xbox console bundle. You'll get the multiple-ways-to-play other-worldly squad-shooter, Brute Force, along with your new console and controller. It's all just $149.99.

SynopsisIt's your senior year at Brooktown High School and you've got one year to make it all happen. There are sporting events to go to, dances to plan, parties to crash and, of course, dates to go on. But life isn't always easy at Brooktown High: there are jocks, nerds, preppies and more, all scrapping for their spot on the status pole. Where will you find your niche? Get ready for senior year  a once-in-a-lifetime chance to rule the school.   Brooktown High gives you the opportunity to live an awesome year in the life of a senior in a wild high school. Begin by creating your own unique character, then walk the halls of Brooktown in search of new friends, the best places to chill and the latest happenings. Go on dates to the movies or the mall. Interactive mini games give you the opportunity to put your skills to the test. Will you be the hottest thing to walk the Brooktown High halls?
Make your home more secure with this easy-to-install stainless-steel gas connector featuring an automatic shutoff valve to protect you from gas leaks.
This scooter features adjustable handlebars for customized use and a wide deck design to help ensure stability. Easily fold the scooter for compact portability.
This lithium-ion battery is designed for use with select Samsung mobile phones and features 3.7V of power and a 1150 mAh capacity to provide ample battery life for making calls.

Enter into a fantasy world of magic and creatures set during World War I. This game picks up a year after the original Shadow Hearts ended and you are reunited with main character, Yuri. On this new expedition he is joined by friends Gepetto, a puppet master, and Kallen, a German female soldier. Nicholas, a member of a secret society, has cursed Yuri and weakened his morphing abilities. Now you must join Yuri and his companions to find a cure for the curse and defeat the secret cult's plans to take over the world.  In this roleplaying adventure, your magic skills play an important role in the journey. Return to battle using the Judgment Ring and choose which characters to bring to the attack. The final outcome of the match will be determined by each player's speed and accuracy. You will become wrapped up in the complex story and meet various characters along your journey. Return to this mystical place and join Yuri on another mysterious and fantastic quest.

SynopsisSometimes it's the smallest of heroes who find themselves caught up in the biggest adventures. In The Tale of Despereaux, the Newbery Medal-winning children's book-turned-CG animated film comes to your screen with all the fun and excitement of this beloved story. As the small but brave Despereaux Tilling, you must embark on a quest to save Princess Pea from a sinister fate. Plunge into the darkness of Rat World and draw on your courage and cleverness to overcome the obstacles that lie in your path.  The Tale of Despereaux invites you to explore the magical world of the film and venture beyond into never-before-seen locations for all-new adventures. Summon your courage as you set off on your quest in pursuit of Princess Pea and make your way through 15 exciting levels filled with action and enemies. Execute thrilling moves and combine them to add even more complexity to your combat experience, and wield a variety of upgradeable weapons as you battle your way to the finish and rescue the princess. Multiple difficulty settings make the game suitable for players of varied ages and ability levels, so both kids and parents can enjoy the adventures of this minuscule hero with tremendous courage and heart.

Enjoy heavy strumming and flat-picking with these D'Addario EXP EXP12 acoustic guitar strings that feature 0.012 - 0.056 gauges for an extra-bright tone for robust sound. The plain steel and wound bronze strings offer durability and consistency.
Whether you want to make chocolate covered strawberries, cheese fondue or fried cheese, this fondue pot is a perfect addition for entertaining.

This high-performance fishfinder/GPS chartplotter features built-in base maps of the United States, including over 100,000 bodies of water. The unit offers enhanced connectivity, including SIRIUS Satellite Radio, Navionics Platinum+ and NMEA 2000.

Let your creativity spill out into any format that suits your style, and craft professional-quality work that showcases your talent all from the convenience of your PC with Imagination Studio Suite 2. This comprehensive software suite combines the resources, tools and innovations of five feature-packed applications to carry your creative potential to new heights  whether you're a video producer, musician, DJ, teacher, Podcast creator or multimedia enthusiast.   With this updated version of Imagination Studio Suite, you'll enjoy immediate access to the combined opportunities of Vegas Movie Studio HD Platinum, DVD Architect Studio, ACID Music Studio, Sound Forge Audio Studio and Photo Go software. Channel your inner auteur, effortlessly polishing your standard or high-definition videos to professional standards, complete with effects, transitions, titles and even 5.1 surround sound and soundtracks. Add the finishing touches to your video creations in DVD Architect Studio, where you'll create DVDs and Blu-ray Disc that really pop, with customized menus and graphics. When it comes to rich sounds and masterful mixing, ACID Music Studio streamlines the music-making process, allowing you to record, edit and mix complex, professional tracks right from one place, and even throw in prerecorded loops, as well as your own MIDI recordings. Expand your media even further with tools for recording, repairing and changing audio from virtually any source  from old cassette tapes to vintage records. Enhance your photo collection with easy one-click editing tools, and organize it in a flash. Whatever way you create, share your work with the world with iPhone, PSP, iPod and Web capabilities.

This organization system features a versatile setup for a variety of configurations and a pocket for additional storage space. The rubberized woven elastic object retention system keeps your devices secure.

SynopsisA cunning necromancer has tricked Death, and now strives for universal power. The beautiful Scarlett, a woman whose existence was a secret until now, is discovering her fate. She is the daughter of Death, and she is the one who possesses the power to defeat the necromancer and restore the balance of power. Scarlett must discover the depths of her newfound powers and become a strong warrior to save her father  and the world of the living.  Venetica transports you to the canal-filled streets of Venice as Scarlett. The daughter of Death, Scarlett must discover her previously unknown powers to save her father and the living world from an evil necromancer. Explore the palaces, dungeons and dark alleyways of Venice as you battle against terrifying creatures from the world of the dead. Master the powers of death and the use of the "Twilight World" in your quest to save the world and restore the balance of power. Immerse yourself in multidimensional gameplay from dungeons, streets, rooftops and water canals to the afterlife thanks to the 3D map architecture. Prepare for a very different city when the sun sets  dynamic night and day cycles influence artificial life activities throughout the vast, open-world atmosphere of Venice. Will you be able to stop the necromancer before it's too late?

Make sure you have a safe and secure method for transporting your Nintendo Wii, your games and your accessories. This Messenger Bag features specific storage compartments designed to make life easier. It is officially licensed by Nintendo, so you can feel confident you are getting a quality product.  This bag has room for a Wii console, two Wii Remotes, one Nunchuk controller and the sensor bar, as well as built-in sleeves for five games. Carrying it is easy, thanks to the fully adjustable, nonslip shoulder strap, or choose to use the comfortably padded handle. The Messenger Bag is constructed of durable nylon and neoprene with reinforced zippers.

With all the convenience of CS4 bundled into the addictive new features of CS5, every print design that goes out your door will look impossibly polished and professional. CS5 software offers a host of productivity features for print design, including more precise image selection in Adobe Photoshop, streamlined object editing in Adobe InDesign and perspective drawing in Adobe Illustrator. Revolutionize everyday creative work with innovative painting tools in Photoshop and Illustrator, and accelerate creative reviews with online services that integrate with Design Standard software. Combining the latest versions of Photoshop CS5, Illustrator CS5, InDesign CS5 and Acrobat 9 Pro, CS5 for Windows expands your designing world, letting a print designer's imagination roam further than ever before. Here's a stylish, well-featured phone with a full-color screen, polyphonic ring tones, Picture Caller ID, Enhanced Messaging and more. You can even send Photo Messages, using an optional camera attachment.

Seto Kaiba, the head of the Kaiba Corporation, is a tough customer who plays rough. Yu-Gi-Oh! Power of Chaos: Kaiba the Revenge forces you to use your skills and cunning to build strategic combos and take this fierce competitor down. Building off the success of Power of Chaos: Yugi the Destiny, this game offers a new dueling field, an innovative user interface and original card game artwork. Do you have what it takes to defeat the evil Kaiba?  Yu-Gi-Oh! Power of Chaos: Kaiba the Revenge works in conjunction with Power of Chaos: Yugi the Destiny or as a stand alone game. The Tutorial mode makes it easy to get started and helps you master such strategic rules as chain combos, card removal, rituals and more. Build up your collection to more than 300 additional cards and even import cards to gain an extra advantage. Artwork taken directly from the original cards add another layer of excitement to this Yu-Gi-Oh! experience.

Are you proud of the music collection you've compiled on your MP3 player? Here's your chance to use your songs in a whole new way. The i-List Music Party Game lets you show your friends that your MP3 collection is the greatest in this fun-filled and fast-paced challenge.  With the i-List Music Party Game, opponents plug their MP3 players into the base unit, turn over a card to reveal a category and then search through their songs to make a match. Categories include such topics as "Song with a girl's name," and "Classic rock"  you then find a corresponding tune and play it before anyone else. See who has the largest library of music and who knows their songs the best. It takes quick thinking and speedy reflexes in order to be the winner.25.99

SynopsisCapture images with the camera in your Nintendo DSi and create one-of-a-kind puzzles to solve in this wild and fun puzzle game. Find 80 amazing photos of wild animals from all over the world, including apes, big cats, small mammals, reptiles, birds, insects, sea life and endangered species in Jigapix Wild World. Will you be able to solve these wild and wondrous puzzles?  Complete challenging puzzles featuring stunning images of wild creatures from all over the globe in Jigapix Wild World. Using your Nintendo DSi's camera, snap a picture of your favorite subject and create your own unique and fun puzzle to solve. Jigapix Wild World comes with 80 amazing images of animals from the bottom of oceans, across vast plains, to the deepest tropical jungles. Solve 40 puzzles that are ready to go and unlock 40 more as you compete in Time Challenge mode. Enjoy the straightforward, casual gameplay as you work to complete a puzzle by yourself, or challenge a friend to a head-to-head race. Put your puzzle-solving skills to the test and discover wild creatures from around the world.
This invisible screen protector shields your phone from scratches and scrapes. The military-grade, scratch-resistant material improves grip with no added bulk.
High-speed USB 2.0 cable connects your computer to USB devices and hubs with data transfer rates up to 480 Mbps.

This phone features a color touch-screen display for easy navigation of features and 4G/HSPA+ speed to help you stay connected with family and friends while you're on the go.   Requires a minimum $10/month Web access fee with all Even More voice plans.  Early termination fees may apply.

SynopsisDo you love to pet kittens until they purr, play with puppies until they're tired out and sneak carrots to rabbits until they get their fill? If you love to love animals, there's a new career that's just for you. A five-star resort just opened up, and it caters to a very specific clientele  the most posh pets ever to strut on four legs. Become a critter concierge and pamper royal pets to their heart's content. You aren't dealing with just any old alley cats  these first-class felines and proud pooches have refined taste and sophisticated talent. Hone their skills, keep them in tip-top shape and soon you'll be collecting the wealth and living the high life with your new furry friends.  When you start working at the Paws & Claws Regal Resort, a hotel full of pet patrons of all different varieties will be in your very able charge. Have fun grooming, primping and playing with six sweet species, including dogs, cats, horses, rabbits and more. Become a world-class chef and cook up gourmet treats for your clients, and after they dine, help them practice tricks and show off their animal intelligence. Make sure you stock up on everything your little princes and princesses need at the pet store  you might want to get a big cart. It's up to you to make the pets' parents proud  send their darlings home sparkling with talent, glowing with health and shining like the stars they are.

With Auto Optimization and a 14-bit A/D converter, this digital SLR camera is able to capture stunning images at high resolutions. The built-in self-cleaning unit helps rid the sensor of dust and allows you to change lenses (not included) without worry.   Learn more about the Canon EOS RebelXSi. (Flash demo)

Travel light when presenting with this Bluetooth presenter that allows you to wirelessly present PowerPoint files from your BlackBerry mobile phone. The presenter also connects to a TV or a projector via a VGA or S-video port for wide-ranging use.
This dock makes charging and syncing a breeze. Why not pick up an extra one for your home or office?

Dispense filtered water from this refrigerator into pitchers, pots and pans with the convenient 180° rotating faucet. A sturdy slide-out dispenser tray will support your container hands-free as it fills.

SynopsisDo you have a passion for puzzles? A love for logic? A rapture for reason? If you automatically open your newspaper to the puzzle page every morning, there's a mind-sharpening, imagination-engaging game just for you  no page-shuffling required. Take illustrated challenges and immersive entertainment everywhere you go with Color Cross, the most vibrant puzzle game that you've ever held in your palm.   In Color Cross, not only are addicting mind twisters at your fingertips, but an entire world of exciting graphics pulls you in for an eye-popping puzzle experience like you've never seen before. Dive into 10 different themed puzzles and get in touch with your fashion sense, science fiction savvy, pirate know-how and more. You'll have the chance to unlock new illustrations and new challenges on every level when you prove your brain-busting power, and work your way up to pro status. With more than 150 puzzles in the palm of your hand, the fun never stops.

Setting a higher standard for performance, this radio features tuner performance found only in the most advanced component receivers. The ability to clearly distinguish faint and closely spaced FM signals, plus an actively-equalized amplifier for room-filling sound and easy-to-use controls, makes it an obvious choice for those who enjoy quality sound and simple, elegant design.

Cook'n Collection is a comprehensive compilation of the most popular Cook'n titles. You'll receive Cook'n Deluxe, Cook'n for Diabetics, Cook'n for Kids, Cook'n Vegetarian, Cook'n Light and Healthy and Cook'n for Every Holiday. Plus you'll get a stylish cooking utensil in every box. Play the role of Jean-Luc Cougar, a special operative for an independent government agency called SCAT (Strategic Covert Actions Team). A terrorist group named Crying Lions has infiltrated the high-security complex that houses the GULF Strategic Weapons System, a high-tech satellite with laser capabilities. They have already destroyed the Center for Space Research, and their leader has announced that they have no demands  the main agenda is destruction. The GULF system needs from three to four hours to power up before the next blast, so Jean-Luc and the other operatives have a short time in which to accomplish the impossible: take back control of the GULF complex or disable it so that the terrorists can't use it.  Experience third-person gun action. You get complete control over your character. Hide, duck, sneak and crawl your way through an enemy-infested 3D environment. Each enemy character is controlled by an individual set of duty guidelines that govern behavior. Some enemies will rush onto the scene upon hearing gunfire, while others may hang back because they have specific orders to guard a certain area. There are constant patrols roaming the area, as well as crafty enemies who will try to sneak up on you before you can them. Each time a predetermined set of conditions is met, you are rewarded with an event cut scene that explain how the current situation came to be.

SynopsisAfter the heroic defeat of the King of Shadows, the denizens of the Sword Coast thought that they were safely on the way to economic recovery. But greed has stepped in the way of progress as trade syndicates sprung up to use the post-war confusion for their own nefarious profits. Your band of explorers will navigate this unsteady environment, either choosing to prey on the weak by pirating caravans and selling the goods on the black market, or else joining with a syndicate and building a trade empire. Can you lead your party through the murky landscape of a war-torn Faerun or will you be taken in by the dark forces at play?  Lead your party through the uncertain environment of Faerun in an engaging adventure that allows you to explore at your own discretion with your customized band of characters. Move through the Sword Coast and Samarach, guided by the open-ended exploration of the new Overland Map. Choose your character classes according to your plans, whether it means a sneaky squad of sorcerers, a robust party of fighters or a harmonious balance of party members. SynopsisThe road streams by underneath your tires as you gun your bike skillfully down the course. The motorcycle hums with power, the engine roaring as you pick up speed. SynopsisAerosmith dared to "Dream On," and just like rock 'n' roll itself, the band-turned-phenomenon lives on. But the "Bad Boys from Boston" weren't always rock gods. Experience all the steps of their rise to fame, from their first gig at Nipmuc High School to legendary shows in sold-out grand stadiums.  Guitar Hero: Aerosmith challenges you to progress to the top by performing in the same venues as the band did throughout its illustrious career. SynopsisYou feel the leather against your palms as you bring the ball up the court. You hold up your fist to call the play while your teammates set up in front of you. The crowd chants "M-V-P, M-V-P" as you cross midcourt and prepare for the final shot. The clock is ticking down, and each tenth of a second transforms into an eternity. The center rushes out to set a pick, you pass to the wing and screen your man off. Rushing down the lane, you get hit by the guard with a perfect bounce pass. The opposing center rushes out to stop you in your path  you jump stop and spin around the foreboding body in your path, lay the ball off the glass and in. The horn sounds and the crowd erupts with cheers. Wanting the ball in the final moments is what being Elite is all about.  NBA Elite 11 is the new moniker for EA Sports' NBA video game franchise and is set to reinvent the basketball simulation video game. An all-new technology base, control scheme and real-time physics system offer more advanced user control than ever. Enjoy the skill set of a pro basketball player with the new hands-on control scheme that provides one-to-one responsiveness of a player's movement. Feel like you're actually dribbling, dunking, passing, shooting, blocking shots, making mid-air adjustments, stealing the ball from your opponent and more  and for the first time, experience the pressure of knowing that your skills in each of these areas fully impact the game's outcome. There's no predetermined outcomes based on the random push of the button  you'll need strategy, reflexes and serious basketball savvy. Each player moves independently with the new real-time physics system and has a unique skill set that you must learn to manage in order to win. Tear off the warm-ups and get in the game like never before with NBA Elite 11.

EVERYONE No Descriptors It's a quiet summer's day at Mission Control, just a few feet from your bedroom window, as you and Tasha sit waiting to watch the space shuttle take off. You hear a strange sound coming from the radio and you have to listen carefully to hear what it says. SynopsisYou want to get fit and stay that way without having to trudge to the gym everyday, but you value the importance of doing it right  with the expertise of a trainer who will give you feedback and tips and who will track your progress to keep you motivated. Sometimes, you'd like to be able to work out with friends and other times you'd prefer to do it alone, and there are also times when you want to be able to brag about your progress. Bottom line, you want a fitness regimen that is tailor made for your body, performance, commitment level and time, and is designed by someone you can trust. Well, get your training started, Nike+ and Kinect can do all that and more.   Experience at-home fitness training designed by the people who train the most elite athletes in the world. Nike's sport science has resulted from years of studying the best ways to bring the human body to its peak performance, and with the help of Kinect camera technology, that science can be applied to you. Receive feedback in real time from a trainer that knows and remembers you without leaving the comfort of your home. Receive progress updates every four weeks when your strength, endurance and overall fitness is assessed for some extra motivation and praise. Work out with your friends or as a team through the social features of Nike+ and Xbox communities, where you can also compare how you stack up against Nike athletes, celebrities and other members of the Nike+ community. Allow fitness to become a regular part of your life and get all of the tools you need to succeed with NIKE+ Kinect Training.

Everyone in the ocean city is buzzing and bustling about, getting ready for the big celebration. But the light from the magic shell is fading and the magical light show may have to be cancelled. Follow the sparkling paths and find all of the dolphins to save the undersea celebration. Along the way, you'll learn to care for cuddlefish and try to free Whisper the whale. Of course, you'll also have to decorate the sea, hand out invitations and compose the music and lyrics for the "Song of the Sea." You have a lot to do, so you'd better get swimming.

SynopsisFrom the fateful day when he survived the Killing Curse and received his scar to the face-off with You-Know-Who in the Tri-Wizard Tournament, to the harrowing battle atop the Astronomy Tower, the life of Harry Potter has been an extraordinary one  even for a wizard. And you've been there for every spell, every potion, every secret and every dark twist. Now, travel with Harry on his quest to discover and destroy Voldemort's Horcruxes  and face his ultimate destiny on an epic adventure to defeat the enemy who has haunted him, and the entire world, from the very beginning. Travel beyond the passageways of Hogwarts and into winding city streets, the isolated wilderness and wizarding locations of legend as you become the Boy Who Lived on the journey that's the beginning of the end. Will he go down in history as the man who saved the wizarding world  or the boy who became Voldemort's ultimate kill?  Apparate into the wizarding world for the most challenging adventure yet in Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 1: The Videogame. A terrifying and powerful combination of Death Eaters, Snatchers and Dementors is fighting to stop your quest  and will stop at nothing to see that the Boy Who Lived ceases to exist. This time, you have more power than ever to defeat these dark foes, with the ability to mix potent potions, unleash cunning curses and even utilize trees, tables and other everyday objects as weapons. Don the Invisibility Cloak, choke down Polyjuice Potion and employ the power of Peruvian Instant Darkness Powder as you battle evil forces and sneak through eerie environments on a quest to find and destroy the Horcruxes of Tom Riddle. Experience the innovation and the total immersion of an HD-enhancing game engine that works with your system to deliver visceral action and stunning graphics. Wizarding landmarks have never been so vivid, the challenge has never been more dangerous and the action has never felt more real. As the seventh year draws to a close, the hunt begins  and the real struggle is only starting.

EVERYONE 10+ Cartoon Violence, Crude HumorIt's just another day in the life of animals at the Central Park Zoo, until those crafty penguins decide to cut loose and inspire a daring zoo break. Now Alex the Lion, the zoo's pride and joy, has left his comfy cage and must lead his lifelong buddies through the mean streets of New York and the dangerous jungle of Madagascar. Join Alex, along with his sidekicks Marty the dreaming Zebra, Melman the hypochondriac Giraffe and Gloria the ultrahip Hippo on an odyssey they'll never forget.  Play the roles of Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria and use each animal's natural abilities to maneuver through the concrete and tropical jungles. Test your animal instincts in mini games and 11 action-packed chapters based on the smash-hit movie. Help Alex realize the full potential of his claws, roar and pounce. Get Marty to pump up his long jump and refine the stealth of his crawl. Put Gloria's butt smash to work to clear the way. Aid Melman in perfecting his helicopter spin and coconut-throwing neck fling. Once you've mastered these animal arts, you can take on three additional bonus chapters, including Shuffleboard, Tiki Golf and Lemur Rave, where you can find your rhythm in the groove of cool jungle beats and play as different characters  from the lovable lemurs to the conniving penguins.

SynopsisAfter a long stretch on the inside, Tommy Vercetti finally is a free man. But rather than stretching his limbs on the streets of his home, Liberty City, his old boss, Sonny Forelli, has sent him to the hedonistic metropolis of Vice City. Once Tommy arrives, however, everything goes wrong: He loses Sonny's money in a setup, and now he's got an angry Sonny on one side and the biker gangs, Cuban gangsters and corrupt politicians of Vice City on the other. With most of Vice City out for Tommy's blood, he decides this city is in need of new criminal leadership  and he's just the man for the job.  Combine the intensity of the Grand Theft Auto franchise with the excesses of the 1980s, and you'll get the uniquely dangerous Grand Theft Auto: Vice City. The era of big hair and pastel suits comes alive in this gripping adventure as you explore one man's descent into a world of corruption and degradation. Roam the glitter and ghettos of the expansive urban sprawl of Vice City as you fight back against those who want you dead and claw your way up the organized crime ladder to ensure the city is run your way.

SynopsisA research team traveling to a remote island in the Bermuda Triangle disappeared under mysterious circumstances 25 years ago. Now weapons and survival expert Craig Dylan has been tasked with protecting a new team daring to venture to the island. The team's task is to study the island's temporal energy and attempt to recover whatever remains of the lost expedition. But Dylan and his fellow travelers' journey is about to take them to a much more distant location than they could have imagined: The island is a portal to the Jurassic period, and the explorers are about to find themselves trapped in the age of dinosaurs.  In Jurassic: The Hunted, you'll assume the role of Craig Dylan as you embark on a dangerous trek into an unknown world. Scour the remote island for weapons as you come face-to-face with 13 different types of dinosaurs and other prehistoric creatures. Engage in brutal arena combat, boss fights and fortification battles across 12 daunting levels as you struggle to stave off your own potential extinction at the hands of titanic ancient predators.

The Simpsons Game features four distinct acts divided into 16 episodes in a comical storyline. Innovative 2D and 3D technology depicts a realistic Springfield populated with more than 100 familiar characters from the show. Each member of the family has distinctive powers that grow by completing battles and picking up items. Amass enough collectibles to snag yourself some trophies, then see them all in the trophy room. Unlock up to 16 Time Challenges and compete in single-player or co-op play. Enjoy rich and varied game play as you solve puzzles, interact with expansive environments and laugh at funny parodies of pop culture and current events.

MATURE 17+  Blood, Violence A young lad's life was changed forever when he saw the brutal murder of his family. The orphaned child was taken in by an Indian master and raised as an expert marksman, and grew to become an outlaw gunslinger riding through the Wild West. It never fails  you're almost done working on that important paper or spreadsheet or are about to battle the final boss, and your computer slows down drastically then freezes. Your computer is probably bogged down with numerous temporary, duplicate or unnecessary junk files. With a few clicks of the mouse, you can clean up your PC and get it running like new by eliminating the clutter, boosting the speed and improving its overall performance.   Improve your computer's performance with AVG PC Tuneup. The easy-to-use software is designed to speed up your PC, clean your hard drive and help prevent freezing and crashing for a smoother, less frustrating computing experience. Use the Internet Optimizer to evaluate your computer's Internet connection settings, and adjust them to boost your connection speed and decrease lags and interruptions. Scan through your registry to find and remove temporary, duplicate and junk files that have accumulated, cluttered up your hard drive and slowed your computer down with the Registry Cleaner. Get the most out of your hard drive with the Disk Defragmenter and Windows Registry Defragmenter, which help improve disk speeds and computer performance. Make sure that your privacy remains intact by eliminating all records of your computer activities, including what documents you've opened, which programs you've run and your Internet browsing history with the Track Eraser. Use the File Shredder to permanently delete files with four different options that range from fast to military-grade safety shredding. Clean out your entire hard drive for additional security thanks to the Disk Wiper tool. With a variety of easy-to-use tools, PC Tuneup allows you to breathe new life into your computer so you can get back to work or play.

SynopsisWhat's an undead traveling salesman supposed to do? He was trying to rest in peace, but some billionaire industrialist started building the city of the future right on top of his cozy little grave. Does that even resemble respect for the dead? Stubbs the Zombie in Rebel Without a Pulse puts a clever spin on the zombie genre. For years gamers have been battling the undead. Now it's time to step into the rotted shoes of a zombie and wreak some havoc on the living. Play as the wisecracking Stubbs and seek some serious revenge on the locals. Your chief target is Andrew Monday, the wealthy magnate who has desecrated Stubbs's final resting place. A basic act of revenge quickly escalates into an all-out war between the living and the dead. Weird humor and true love are just the tip of the iceberg in this outrageous adventure.

SynopsisBlast off for wacky and wonderful thrills in the feature-packed Galactic Edition of Spore. Spore is the exciting new simulation game that lets you develop your own personal universe. Work your way through five evolutionary phases, including Cell, Creature, Tribe, Civilization and Space, that offer unique challenges and goals. For example, you can start in Cell and nurture one species from a simple aquatic organism all the way until it becomes a sentient life form. Or you can jump right in and begin building tribes and civilizations on multiple planets. What you do with your universe is totally up to you.  The powerful creation tools of Spore are easy to use, allowing you to effortlessly design every aspect of your universe. Creatures, vehicles, buildings and even starships are all within your grasp. While Spore is a single-player game, your creations and other players' creations are automatically shared between your galaxy and theirs, offering a nearly limitless number of worlds to visit and enjoy. You can also go online to view the incredible things other players have made and can even pull those items into your universe. Spore gives you the chance to make worlds and beings that evolve, grow and delight you every step of the way. This special edition also comes with a Making of Spore DVD, The Human Toolkit DVD video by National Geographic, The Art of Spore hardback mini book, a fold-out Spore poster and a premium 100-page Galactic Handbook.

SynopsisIn 1989, John Madden Football decleated its rivals, changing the face of football video games forever by being the first to offer authentic 11-on-11 action and player statistical ratings. With unheralded dedication to Xs and Os and hall-of-fame coach John Madden's insight and ingenuity, the Madden series began by laying a foundation of realism that emphasized the playbook as much as the playing field. Nineteen years later, the longest-running sports franchise of all time presents the latest and most exciting edition to storm your living room. Madden NFL 08 is geared up and ready to fly off your screen with awesome graphics, in-depth play calling, amazing player likenesses, authentic stadiums and more that will thrust you into the exciting world of professional football.  Lead your favorite team to a Super Bowl championship as you manage your roster, customize your playbook and conquer a grueling schedule. Take the field as your favorite NFL superstars, and experience the rush of launching a game-winning pass or making a quarterback eat turf on fourth and goal. Relish the genuine sights and sounds of the NFL as you sprint for pay dirt in authentic stadiums. It's pain and passion; chemistry and catastrophe. It's watching your dreams go out on a stretcher and fighting for inches that feel like miles. It's the hard-hitting, nerve-rattling world of NFL football as only Madden can deliver. It's the game the players play.

SynopsisYou dig into the box and grip the bat as you stare down the pitcher on the mound. As the ball rockets into the clear blue sky, you notice the pitcher immediately hang his head and the outfielders race back toward the fence. The centerfielder reaches over the fence and the ball misses his glove by inches, landing in the grass as the crowd erupts. As you round the bases, your teammates are waiting at home plate. Choose from among a massive selection of cars and motorcycles from big-name brands, such as Lamborghini, Ducati, Aston Martin, Mercedes and Jaguar, among others. Head out on your own and explore more than 1,000 miles of pure Hawaiian freeway, or rev it up with intense, realistic racing action. Through competition and perseverance, you'll show everyone you have what it takes to win and the wad of cash to prove it. Use your in-game earnings to customize your vehicle, buy new clothes, cars and even homes and garages. This is like nothing you've seen before in a racing game.   In this ever-expanding world, there is always something new to do or see. You can fly solo or hook up with other people to create clubs where you can race, chat or sponsor club-based competitions. In this game that brings a whole new dimension to the racing genre, you will be able to participate in extracurricular activities, such as expanding your garage, getting clothes and accessories, helping hitchhikers, chasing down car thieves and more. This game has a little something for everyone, from custom challenge creation to intense races that will have you whipping around corners and flying through the air. Monthly additions of new vehicles, aftermarket parts, clothes, accessories and more give you unlimited hours of enjoyable gameplay with all the thrills of a racing game plus so much more.

In Rise to Honor, Boss Chiang, the leader of a notorious crime family, has been murdered. Before his death, Chiang requested that a letter be delivered to his daughter in San Francisco. It's now up to you as Kit Yun (Jet Li) to advance through 10 levels, from Hong Kong to California, to honor Chiang's final request. Remember that the journey itself is going to be tiring, yet you're going to have to face members of rival crime families who are out to stop you from granting Chiang's wish.   Are you ready to try out Hong Kong-style fighting sequences and maximize Jet Li's special talents? In Rise to Honor, you can utilize all of Li's fighting techniques, including running up walls and performing back flips, counter moves and blocks  but first you must start with traditional moves, like kicks and punches, to fill up your adrenaline meter in order to use the special moves. Be prepared to confront enemies at every turn using the 360° fighting engine, which will allow you to execute your most powerful moves from any direction in the environment.

SynopsisWhen a U.S. missile shoots down a commercial airliner over Eastern Europe, killing all aboard, global political tensions reach a breaking point. Take on the role of Thornton and prepare to enter a shadowy world of danger, espionage and sheer adrenaline as you apply all your powerful skills and abilities to hunt down the culprits and bring them to justice.  Alpha Protocol immerses you in a gripping world of geopolitical intrigue. In this intense modern-day RPG, you'll take on the role of Agent Michael Thornton, developing him into the spy of your choice. Cultivate powerful skills and abilities, and make the decisions that will guide your path to ultimate success or failure. Whether you opt to pursue a mission with firepower, technology or the power of charisma, your choices and interactions will dynamically alter the storyline, opening up a myriad of new missions and challenges to confront.

Along the way, you'll encounter all sorts of otherworldly creatures. Befriend an ancient dragon and a talking wand, and expel an evil witch and her followers from within their dangerous lair. Deadly traps, foul beasts and malevolent forces fill this strange and perilous landscape. Can make it out alive from within the mountain's core?  You'll find yourself amazed during the epic 10-hour storyline. Tread carefully through 12 amazingly detailed levels of Zharrharag, being ever watchful for deadly obstacles and ancient treasure. Use the DS touch screen to solve tricky puzzles that threaten to stop you in your tracks. Select from a generous arsenal of mystical weapons, such as magical swords, lethal crossbows, a sentient wand and a powerful warhammer. You'll also have spells, potions, magic rings and dragonscale armor to battle the unbelievably gruesome creatures. SynopsisWhen you were growing up and playing catch, you always dreamed of this moment. You're standing on the mound in the middle of the cavernous stadium, one strike away from perfection. Twenty-six players have come up to bat, and you've sent them all back to the dugout with their heads hanging. Number 27 is at the plate and the count is in your favor. You peer into the catcher and he flashes the sign  good old number one  it's time to bring the heat. You kick your leg and wind up with everything left in the tank. The crowd holds its collective breath and flashbulbs pop as the ball cuts through the air toward the plate. The batter hesitates just enough and begins his swing, but it's too late. The pop of the catcher's mitt reverberates through the stadium as your teammates mob you on the mound. This is perfection.   The makers of the award-winning NBA 2K11 are returning to the diamond with Major League Baseball 2K11. Lace up your spikes, tar up the bat, grab your glove and head out onto the field as you field, pitch, steal and hit your way to victory  now with more ways to experience the thrill. Find out if you have what it takes to build a Series-winning team in Franchise mode, or test your hitting talent against the pros in a Home Run Derby. Control every aspect of the team strategy as a manager, and expertly craft the perfect player lineup and more to tactically climb to the top. The competition is just as fierce  or maybe even fiercer  when you take a trip down to the Minor Leagues and play with some of the rising stars from the farm team.

SynopsisGet ready to experience an all-new breed of MMO with TERA. Featuring the same immersive storylines and engaging gameplay of a traditional MMO, TERA throws you into an exciting world filled with dangerous quests, interesting characters and thrilling combat. Are you ready for an exhilarating new way to experience the MMO genre?  Dive into an all-new way to play the MMO genre with TERA: Collector's Edition. Choose from eight classes and seven races, and embark on more than 1,700 quests throughout 80 zones. Utilizing enhanced aiming, dodging and tactical timing, TERA lets you dominate your foes on the battlefield in exciting action combat that is based on your skills, not statistics. Immerse yourself in the world with brilliant visuals brought to life by Unreal Engine 3. With this Collector's Edition, you'll receive a Letter of Marque, a Federation-issued compass, a map of TERA, a Valkyon Federation handbook and the original soundtrack. With immersive storytelling and arresting gameplay combined with exciting action combat, TERA: Collector's Edition transforms the MMORPG gameplay experience.

Mistaken for a renowned hero, Capell finds himself thrust into the middle of a savage conflict. Now he must rely on his 17 companions to help him travel the length and breadth of the land on a quest to sever the chains that bind the moon to the world. Only by shattering the chains can the terrible Order of Chains be defeated. Along the way, he and his companions will find themselves struggling to survive against an opponent more powerful than they are. But as Capell will soon find out, not all battles are won by force.  Featuring an incredible 30-hour storyline co-written by Record of Lodoss War creator Ryo Mizuno, Infinite Undiscovery is a thrilling RPG designed to make full use of the power of Xbox 360. Experience the excitement as up to 12 characters engage in battle at once, all in real time. But take caution, because leaping into a fight is not always the best course  a series of "situational battles" will challenge your ability to think strategically and evaluate the most effective action to take. Act in haste, and you may find you've acted unwisely. As you struggle against the rule of the Order of Chains, your decisions can help Capell become the hero he was meant to be.

SynopsisThey may be small and they may be wispy  but don't you dare call them wimpy. The nefarious Dr. Eggman has uncovered the secret of a strange and powerful alien race called Wisps, and now he's out to harness their Color energy for his own evil plan for world domination. Only one hero can foil the doctor's nefarious schemes, and that hero sports a color of his own  blue. Jet into the fantastical world of the Wisps as everyone's favorite blue speed demon and prepare for a truly colorful adventure that will accelerate you to all-new levels.  Sonic Colors invites you into a mysterious astro-themed amusement park, where you'll race, ride and throttle full-speed into danger for the greater cause. Blast through obstacles at faster speeds than ever, beam away enemies with sharp-shooting lasers and drill through the ground thanks to a little help from the Wisps' Color Powers. Explore a fantastical factory in the sky and venture into lush vegetation, discovering hidden pathways along the way. The power of colorful energy beckons, but this is no "somewhere over the rainbow"  if you can't use the kaleidoscopic abilities for good, Dr. Eggman's evil color scheme might just lead to a worldwide fading. Can you color yourself a hero in time to save the planet?

SynopsisYou watch the story unfold as your eyes jump from one cell to the next, rifling through the pages to see how it all ends. Does the bad guy get away? Splooosh  the villain gains an upper hand. Smash  your favorite Super Hero crashes into the secret hideout. The hostages have been untied, but  bamf  the villain lands a crushing blow on the Hero's chin. A fight ensues and just when the criminal thinks he's getting away this time  pow  your Hero does him in, saving the day once again. Don't you just love comic books?  Now, you don't have to read and wait to see what happens  you can join the fight. Grab the pen and become a real Marvel comic book artist to thwart Doctor Doom's evil plan in uDraw: Marvel Super Hero Squad: Comic Combat. Using the uDraw GameTablet stylus, you can command your favorite Marvel Super Heroes, including Captain America, Thor, Iron Man, Wolverine, the Hulk and for the first time ever in a video game, Squirrel Girl. The gameplay relies primarily on you, so draw in a curved line to mark the perfect path for Captain America's shield to take out a mob of enemies. Draw a circle to add a boulder to the comic book world. Or, pinch your fingers to create "zipper rift" that sucks the enemies into oblivion. The original story is divided into six in-game comic book issues, and you'll have to fight to keep the pages turning before eventually taking out Doctor Doom. With a cell-shaded art style and a range of environments like The Helicarrier, Baxter Building, The Vault and Sanctum Santorum, you'll be completely immersed in the comic book world. The pen  or stylus  is mightier than the sword. Join the fight and draw the line between good and evil, helping the Super Hero Squad take out Doctor Doom along the way.

SynopsisThe suit, the barcode tattoo and the iconic shaved head. No one means business like Agent 47. When the cold-blooded assassin has been contracted, you know the job will be carried out effectively, efficiently and secretly. Hitman: Absolution has you slip on the black gloves of the hired gun on his most dangerous job yet. Hunted by the police, he finds himself at the center of a dark conspiracy after being betrayed by those he once trusted. Now he must set out through a corrupt and twisted world in search for answers.   Put on the suit of the legendary assassin, Agent 47, in Hitman: Absolution. Embark on a journey through a corrupt and twisted world in search of answers behind a dark conspiracy of which you find yourself at the center. Powered by new proprietary Glacier 2 technology, the game has been constructed from the ground up, and allows you to experience the brutal, raw and intense adventure with a cinematic story, distinctive art direction and cutting-edge game and sound design. Enjoy the freedom to eliminate your targets as you see fit, whether you prefer to stalk from the shadows or burst in guns blazing. But beware  the world around you realistically responds to your every tactic thanks to the fully evolved game mechanics and a highly developed AI system. Jump into the iconic suit like never before with the Instinct mode, which allows you to see the world through the eyes of a deadly assassin. Identify weapons and escape routes, predict enemy patrols and engage in Point-Shooting to eliminate entire rooms efficiently with your expert marksmanship. Blend into your environments and pose as your victims with a variety of disguises, and take advantage of the new actions, options and, of course, the element of surprise. With the target squarely on your back, it's time to slip on the black gloves and take on the contract of your life in Hitman: Absolution.

SynopsisFive years ago, a now-legendary disaster led the skating paradise of San Vanelona to be evacuated, and the city was left largely in ruins. A company called Mongocorp is spearheading the reconstruction effort, intending to restore the city to its glory days. But the corporation guards its private property zealously, putting a damper on the skating scene that once helped to define San Van. Now, after five years in exile, you must return to the city where you once made a name for yourself. Only by reviving your own career and working with a band of determined locals can you reinvigorate the local skate scene and take back San Van for the skaters, one spot at a time.  Get ready to show off your sickest tricks as you prove you have what it takes to own every spot in New San Vanelona. In Skate 2, you have a whole new bag of tricks to draw on, from handplants to hippy jumps. Enlist your crew to help you rebuild the city and provide personal security, and get off your board to design incredible spots designed to show off your talents. Upload your favorite spots to share them with other skaters online, and download other players' creations for a new skating challenge. Personalize your skater with the Graphics Creator, experience the thrill of all-new bone-crushing bail physics and compete for skating glory online as Skate 2 opens a new and awesomely punishing skating world for you to conquer.

SynopsisKate Walker is a lawyer who is overseeing the buyout of Voralberg Manufacturing, an old automaton factory in a small alpine village in France. Although Anna Voralberg, the only remaining Voralberg, agreed to the Universal Toy Company's takeover, the deal goes sour when Kate learns of Anna's death. As Kate discovers more about this odd business of automaton manufacturing she finds herself drawn into a life-shattering adventure that takes her throughout Europe. Kate's only hope of closure with this case is to find a mysterious inventor named Hans Voralberg, a man who just might hold the key to this whole sordid affair.  Syberia is an artistic, puzzle-solving 3rd person adventure. Play as intrepid lawyer Kate Walker as she enters a compelling storyline depicted with detailed graphics and 3D characters. SynopsisHe craves adventure, lives for the hunt, basks in the fortune. The fabled, ancient secrets of the "Atlantis of the Sands" are calling to Nathan Drake  and this time, the mysteries of the past will drag the fortune hunter into the darkest corners of his own psyche as the Uncharted phenomenon continues. Whisked around the world from a derelict chateau in France to the vast, untamed terrain of the Arabian desert in search of glory and riches, Drake has returned to the grueling life of an explorer, only to discover that the buried secrets he's about to uncover could end his quest forever.  Prima Games' official strategy guide to Uncharted 3: Drake's Deception helps you snag the coveted treasure thousands of years in the making  and live to tell the tale  with the 256 pages of exclusive intelligence, winning strategies and empowering tips. Get a focused look at the challenges ahead in a step-by-step walkthrough of your global quest, including complete coverage of multiplayer battles, and propel yourself miles ahead of the competition. As you face a fierce climate and even fiercer adversaries, arm yourself with the guide's key information on every move, weapon, enemy, treasure, trophy and unlockable. Complete with bountiful extras, including a story recap of the entire Uncharted series, behind-the-scenes interviews at Naughty Dog and an exclusive, official artwork gallery, this is one guide that's worth hunting down.

SynopsisWho says fitness for kids means practicing jumping jacks in a dingy school gymnasium or helping out with the vacuuming? Getting active can be as fun as watching favorite Nickelodeon shows when you invite Dora, Diego, the Backyardigans and Kai-lan into your living room for a game-filled party that gets everyone moving, learning and growing strong. Somewhere between pogoing, rafting, leaping and racing, your kids will discover one thing's for sure  staying healthy with Nickelodeon isn't nearly as boring as gym class.  Kids can race down a river with Diego, jump rope with Dora and leap over hurdles with Kai-lan as they play their way to fitness in Nickelodeon Fit. Featuring 30 kid-approved games that are sure to put a smile on your children's faces and expert-developed techniques that are sure to put a smile on yours, Nickelodeon Fit is designed with little bodies in mind, targeting cardiovascular activity, core muscles, upper and lower body strength, balance, motor skill development and coordination in a way that's safe and fun for them. As your kids become stronger and healthier, keep track of every accomplishment along the way, and even customize personal workouts to help them improve wherever they need it. Vamanos! Lifetime fitness is the adventure in store, and there's so much to explore.

No one's going to hand over their territory  take it by conquering and colonizing planets and asteroids. Seize control of new worlds and everyone in them, and be prepared to defend your lands using tactical combat and precise strategy. Only the strongest, smartest commanders can keep this new Solar Empire united.  Three distinct races dominate this saga, each with unique features, stories and customizable traits. Build powerful armies, put your fleet in place, and start expanding your empire to even larger proportions. Set up trading networks, conduct research, establish diplomacy and maintain control. The entire experience comes to life with spectacular 3D graphics drawn to scale using the proprietary Iron Engine. SynopsisYou're given the go ahead and you throttle up, screeching down the runway and soaring nearly straight up into the sky. As soon as you clear the cloud cover, you see the enemy directly ahead and you engage. Before you can fire a warning shot across his nose, your computer alerts you to an incoming missile and you instinctively roll to the right, barely missing it. You head straight down to the ground as the enemy gives chase. Pulling up just before hitting the Earth, you begin a cat-and-mouse chase across the ground toward the city. A split-second decision has you quickly dodging a skyscraper before heading back to face the enemy head on. With his plane targeted and your thumb poised over the button, will you turn him into supersonic debris?  Take to the skies for thrilling and visceral aerial battles in Ace Combat: Assault Horizon. Featuring a realistic storyline penned by New York Times bestseller and military author, Jim DeFelice, Ace Combat places you in the cockpit of an enthralling war drama that spans real-world locations around the globe. Engage in escalating combat that has you dodging skyscrapers, experiencing split-second maneuvering and positioning, pinpoint targeting, performing hovering attacks and turning enemies into supersonic debris. Perform daring acrobatics, dizzying one-on-one encounters and more. Clash with hostile forces in a variety of modes with the re-invented Ace Combat online. Are you ready for fast and high-flying combat?

SynopsisYour engine idles, humming softly as you wait. You clutch the steering wheel and rev your engine. Your focus is intense on the black-and-white checkered flag through your windshield. With a jerk it bolts down  your foot slams the gas pedal, you smell the burning rubber and you feel your engine jolt to life. This is what you live for. As you rip around the racetrack, hazards spring out of nowhere  you twist your steering wheel, still accelerating, and scrape by just in time. In this race, your opponents will do whatever it takes to keep you out of the lead. Are you tough enough to fight back?   In Super Speed Machines, you're in the driver's seat of a vehicle built for one purpose  to race and ride with incredible acceleration. Any of the six rides that you choose to call your own is a powerhouse just waiting to be revved, raced and busted up on the track. As you rip through 48 courses in eight challenging zones, you'll run into hazards at every turn  but you'll also be leaving some surprises of your own for your racing rivals. Take advantage of the sneaky shortcuts and energetic boosts at your disposal, if you're sly enough to find them. Bring your friends into the action and show them who's number one as you compare stats or race together in a four-player Single Cart race. Buckle up  it's going to be a tough ride to the finish line.

SynopsisIf you thought the nightmare was over, think again. The madness of isolation and the reality at hand are one and the same as engineer Isaac Clarke returns for another blood-curdling adventure in the sequel to the critically acclaimed Dead Space. The terror of being hunted by the government and haunted by a dead lover merge into a single, cohesive paralyzing emotion  but you have to persevere despite the creeping paranoia of dementia and the grotesquery slouching within every shadow. The Necromorphs are ripping the massive city to pieces and if you're going to survive "The Sprawl", you'll have to get desperate in order to last in Dead Space 2.  Isaac Clarke isn't free of the terror of his situation, but don't worry  it's about to get worse. You'll have to seize opportunity by the throat if you're going to survive being hunted by the government and withstand visions of a dead girlfriend. Equip yourself with the tools to decimate and eviscerate the horrors surrounding you, like improved telekinesis, trip mines or even hull breaches to suck those things back into the dead of space where they belong. It won't be a walk in the park, though. In fact, you'll experience "The Sprawl" like never before in zero gravity with full 360° movement, destroying creatures in new weightless combat and unique, physics-based puzzles. Don't fret, you can share the loneliness of space  and the Necromorphs  with friends online in skirmishes to see if anyone really can hear you scream in space.

With cheerful animated characters and the laws of real-world physics, you'll piece together the puzzles and become king of the geeks.  I Heart Geeks lets you turn the tables on the nerd vs. jock cliché. Thanks to the friendly interface and helpful tutorial, you can jump right into the puzzle-solving adventures. With more than 100 unique puzzles that vary in challenge and difficulty, you'll use dozens of devices to progress through the game and work your way closer to the cheerleader's heart. Each puzzle has several possible solutions, so grab your stylus to move components, test out your ideas and fire up your crazy contraptions to see if your nerd skills pay off. SynopsisTokyo, Japan, 2080. The Amada Corporation has created humanoid robots that believe themselves to be human, thus breaking Geneva Code, Clause 21. The hostile and dangerous robots have invaded the populous city on the Pacific rim, blurring the lines between man and machine, and thus threatening humanity's very existence. As a member of an international peace-keeping squad sent to the region, it's up to Dan Marshall and the Rust Crew to put a stop to the machines and re-establish the humans as the dominant race on this planet. However, as your squad battles against the bots, they start to question their surroundings  and themselves. Will you be able to end the invasion before it's too late?  Brought to you by the creator of the critically acclaimed Yakuza franchise, Binary Domain has you head into battle against an invading force of robots in futuristic Japan. Step into the role of Dan Marshall and lead your Rust Crew into heart-racing combat against an enemy that is constantly learning and forcing you to think and rethink your every move on the battlefield. The destructible and highly resilient robots are constantly adapting to the damage they sustain, forcing you to find each enemy's weaknesses in order to attack and destroy them efficiently. Choose your actions and words carefully as they affect everything on the battlefield. Race through the derelict lower levels of Tokyo while fighting mechanized monsters that seek to end your way of life. Lock and load with an armory of unique weapons, modifications and skill selections that aim to benefit you in combat. Fight with or against other players around the world in a wide range of versus and co-op modes online. It's time to take back your Domain.

SynopsisIt is September 1998 and there has been an outbreak of the deadly T-virus in Raccoon City. Umbrella orders an elite team into the city to cover up the accident, destroy all evidence and eliminate any and all survivors. However, Raccoon City has caught the watchful eye of the United States government, which has authorized a quarantine on the city. An elite team of special forces has been dispatched to investigate the cause of the outbreak. With zombies and Bio-Organic Weapons on the loose, this dark and terrifying city is about to be witness to horrific battles between the three competing forces.  Go inside the dark and sinister Raccoon City to cover up the horrific consequences of a deadly T-virus outbreak, and eliminate any and all survivors in Resident Evil: Operation Raccoon City. As a member of the Umbrella Security Service, you must destroy all evidence of the outbreak while competing against U.S. Special Ops and fighting against zombies and Bio-Organic Weapons (B.O.W.s). Experience the terrifying Resident Evil universe in this third-person team-based shooter that lets you compete in the Campaign mode alone or fight in four-player co-op battles. Revisit classic Resident Evil 2 and Resident Evil 3 moments and watch the events surrounding the outbreak unfold from a new perspective. Encounter favorite Resident Evil enemies, memorable landmarks and formidable characters, including Leon S. Kennedy. Take the fight online in competitive multiplayer modes that feature unique three-corner combat between the Umbrella Security Service, U.S. Special Ops and the constant threat of zombies and B.O.W.s.

SynopsisWaking from comas that lasted years, Daniel Lamb and Leo Kasper are suddenly confronted with four concrete walls and a slew of unanswered questions. On first glance, neither of the survivors recalls knowing the other, but then again, they don't even really know themselves. What the bewildered men don't realize is that for the past six years they've been guinea pigs in an evil, top-secret experiment called the Pickman Project. But now the door to their asylum cell is ajar, so they decide it's time to flee to freedom. The leaders of the experiment will do everything in their power to catch them and prevent the duo from uncovering the truth about what really happened. Will Daniel and Leo ever escape this nightmare and reclaim the lives they've lost?  In Manhunt 2, you must overcome the nefarious forces of the Pickman Project if you wish to survive. As you search for answers, you'll be haunted by demented screams in the dark asylum that has been your home for much too long. A bloody syringe is still dangling from your arm as waves of confusion and paranoia begin to wash over you. Do your best to figure out the events of the past and overcome the looming threats that threaten your future.

SynopsisA brave new form of racing has taken the world by storm by the middle of the 22nd century. With a combination of rally races, demolition derbies and high-performance aeronautics, the action is fast, violent and intense. Drivers command gravity-defying vehicles that leave old-fashioned speedways behind  the untamed wilderness is now the place where races occur. Prepare for futuristic thrills that take you through canyons, forests and ice fields and more than 500 miles per hour.  Fatal Inertia is more than just a test of speed; you must overcome the mental and physical punishment of low-altitude combat maneuvering. Each race craft is armed with unconventional weapons that manipulate velocity, force and time, including heavy magnets that impact speed, handling, balance and drag. Customize your machine with more than 1.3 million customization combinations plus 15,000 performance combinations. With awesome single-player and online multiplayer options, 16 racing series and six distinct racing environments, Fatal Inertia blasts you into the future with sizzling speed and outrageous action.

SynopsisYou'll be treated to a wealth of bonus materials with the Unreal Tournament 3 Collector's Edition. Continuing the intensity of the well-known series, Unreal Tournament 3 unleashes the full power of the Unreal Engine 3 on your PC. In this adventure, you're thrown into the thick of the Necris invasion and immersed in the battle of your life. Defend what's left of your clan with an arsenal of more than 24 powerful, futuristic weapons and a slew of upgraded vehicles. Both new and returning characters can be friends or foes, so watch your back. Whether you're under attack from advanced Artificial Intelligence adversaries or from human online warriors, one thing's for sure  you're in for gut-wrenching, breathtaking action once you've entered the world of this compelling first-person shooter.  Share the battlefield with familiar and all-new characters, each with enhanced abilities and distinct personalities. Decide which weapon works best as you take your revenge on the invaders. Should you use the Shock Rifle to obliterate the enemy from a distance? Or would the close-range Flak Cannon do the job? It's all up to you to devise the winning strategy, proving that this saga requires just as much brain power as firepower. Put your survival skills to the test in challenging Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch, Capture the Flag and all-new Warfare game modes. The award-winning Unreal Engine 3 Toolset lets you build your own levels, game types and more, and you can also download the latest mods from the massive Unreal online community. This special Collector's Edition includes an exclusive DVD loaded with more than 20 hours of toolkit video tutorials, The History of the Unreal Tournament and behind-the-scenes info.

Travel with Ben through the United States to find and piece together the lost pieces of the Omnitrix. See if Ben and his family can overcome the chaos and save Earth from a horrible fate. SynopsisWhen you're on the ice, anything can happen  and frequently does. A puck-smashing, opponent-pummeling, ice-dominating prodigy, you are fast on your way to hockey greatness, and the success of just one match lies between you and your NHL dream. You glide to the center red line and look into your opponent's shielded face as you crouch down in preparation. The puck falls, as if in slow motion, as you both spring forward, sticks thrashing, ice flying and limbs thrusting. Just as you start to break away, you take a bone-crushing hit and hear the splintering of wood as your stick snaps apart. If you can't use your sharp reflexes and agile intuition to wrest away the puck, your dream could slip away forever. Are you a true NHL champion?  Skate into realistic hockey action, the likes of which you've only seen at the rink itself, as you take on the future of hockey gaming in NHL 11. This time, as you take it to the ice, every deke, hip check and scramble is in revolutionary, real-time, physics-triggered realism. With a pioneering physics engine, NHL 11 reacts to your every move with precision for the most authentic hockey experience available. Use all-new and enhanced skills as you strive for the Canadian Hockey League's Memorial Cup for the first time in a thrilling new career mode and celebrate your glories in banner-raising ceremonies. With NHL 11, the ice action has never been so real, and if you're lucky, neither has your puck prowess.

Do you have what it takes to step up to the plate and claim your stake in baseball history?  Each year, only one MLB team earns the title of a champion. Each year, only one sports game scores the highest ratings in the world. That game is The Show. Continue your Season, Franchise and Road to the Show at home  or on the go  with cross-platform saves between your PlayStation 3 and PS Vita. Get up off the bench  The Show is back on.
