SynopsisThe suit, the barcode tattoo and the iconic shaved head. No one means business like Agent 47. When the cold-blooded assassin has been contracted, you know the job will be carried out effectively, efficiently and secretly. Hitman: Absolution has you slip on the black gloves of the hired gun on his most dangerous job yet. Hunted by the police, he finds himself at the center of a dark conspiracy after being betrayed by those he once trusted. Now he must set out through a corrupt and twisted world in search for answers.   Put on the suit of the legendary assassin, Agent 47, in Hitman: Absolution. Embark on a journey through a corrupt and twisted world in search of answers behind a dark conspiracy of which you find yourself at the center. Powered by new proprietary Glacier 2 technology, the game has been constructed from the ground up, and allows you to experience the brutal, raw and intense adventure with a cinematic story, distinctive art direction and cutting-edge game and sound design. Enjoy the freedom to eliminate your targets as you see fit, whether you prefer to stalk from the shadows or burst in guns blazing. Blend into your environments and pose as your victims with a variety of disguises, and take advantage of the new actions, options and, of course, the element of surprise. Stealthily eliminate targets with the Agency Jagd P22G, a modern, top-tier pistol, take out entire rooms easily with the Agency HX UMP, a high-calibur SMG, or blast away enemies with the Agency SPS 12, a brutal, semi-automatic shotgun. With the target squarely on your back, it's time to slip on the black gloves and take on the contract of your life in Hitman: Absolution.

Go online and interact with a limitless number of players for unpredictable and ever-changing results. A realistic physics engine provides stunning 3D graphics, weather effects and such details as cloaks and hair that blow in the breeze. Battle majestic beasts, powerful armies and mythical creatures that test your strength and intelligence. Discover new races, skills and magic and lead your clan to success.

SynopsisThe planet Reach is the last line of defense against the encroaching Covenant's ultimate goal of destroying Earth. In this tragic and heroic story that sets the stage for the Halo saga, you are faced with impossible odds to save countless lives and defend Reach from annihilation. If your mission fails  then humanity faces an inevitable demise.  This prequel to the Halo saga sends you to the planet Reach and immerses you in the heroic, yet ominous story. Halo: Reach places you in the role of a member of the elite Noble Team engaging in battle against the Covenant. It is your mission to defend Reach against the invading forces to protect the fate of humanity from devastation. Your weapons, armor and deadly skills are as unique as each of the Spartan soldiers' personalities. Prepare for this epic storyline alone or team up with up to three friends and launch a co-op assault against the incredibly cunning AI which adds a level of complexity to each encounter and battle. The multiplayer action that Halo fans have come to expect delivers once again by setting a new standard of competitive online gameplay, customization, matchmaking and community integration. The God of War Collection combines the first two titles in this epic series, God of War and God of War II, on one disc, with each game remastered in brilliant high definition. Feel your wrath rise as you play as the powerful warrior Kratos, and stop at nothing to bring down the God of War and turn the tide of fate.  Enter a dark and forbidding mythological world in the remastered God of War Collection. SynopsisFrom the fateful day when he survived the Killing Curse and received his scar to the face-off with You-Know-Who in the Tri-Wizard Tournament, to the harrowing battle atop the Astronomy Tower, the life of Harry Potter has been an extraordinary one  even for a wizard. And you've been there for every spell, every potion, every secret and every dark twist. Now, travel with Harry on his quest to discover and destroy Voldemort's Horcruxes  and face his ultimate destiny on an epic adventure to defeat the enemy who has haunted him, and the entire world, from the very beginning. Travel beyond the passageways of Hogwarts and into winding city streets, the isolated wilderness and wizarding locations of legend as you become the Boy Who Lived on the journey that's the beginning of the end. Will he go down in history as the man who saved the wizarding world  or the boy who became Voldemort's ultimate kill?  Apparate into the wizarding world for the most challenging adventure yet in Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 1: The Videogame. A terrifying and powerful combination of Death Eaters, Snatchers and Dementors is fighting to stop your quest  and will stop at nothing to see that the Boy Who Lived ceases to exist. This time, you have more power than ever to defeat these dark foes, with the ability to mix potent potions, unleash cunning curses and even utilize trees, tables and other everyday objects as weapons. Don the Invisibility Cloak, choke down Polyjuice Potion and employ the power of Peruvian Instant Darkness Powder as you battle evil forces and sneak through eerie environments on a quest to find and destroy the Horcruxes of Tom Riddle. Experience the innovation and the total immersion of an HD-enhancing game engine that works with your system to deliver visceral action and stunning graphics. Wizarding landmarks have never been so vivid, the challenge has never been more dangerous and the action has never felt more real. As the seventh year draws to a close, the hunt begins  and the real struggle is only starting.

SynopsisOne's a flawed mercenary, the other's a medicated psychopath. Pair them together and there's bound to be friction. In Kane & Lynch: Dead Men, follow the lives of these unlikely partners who must rely on each other to survive and save the ones they love. Can they put their hatred for each other aside to achieve a greater good?  Accompany this brutal duo through destructible environments filled with fluid, high-definition graphics. Lead a team of criminal mercenaries that protect you by drawing fire, providing cover and unleashing weapons on the enemy. Visit realistic locations, such as crowded nightclubs and quiet banks, filled with artificial intelligence characters. Disturb the peace with powerful weapons in intense third-person battles. Whether you're rappelling from a building or firing from a moving vehicle, you must use your skill and strategy to complete each objective. SynopsisStaunton City was once a nice, quiet place to settle down, but those days are a thing of the past. Now the sounds of chirping birds have been replaced with machine guns and the soothing laughter of children has been replaced with deafening explosions. The city has turned into an automotive battle zone for which only the fastest, most dangerous cars will survive. Your job, should you accept it, is to destroy all who cross you and claim the city as your own.  Shoot everything you see, blow up entire city blocks and explore endless routes as you fight to conquer the six different districts that make up Staunton City. In single-player mode, steal your opponent's weapons and cars. Fight and race your friends in split-screen mode or play one of six multiplayer games, including online action for up to eight players. SynopsisYou've broken free from the boss man and now you're in charge. See if you have what it takes to manage your own trucking company in 18 Wheels of Steel: American Long Haul. To be the best, you've got to move your cargo faster than the competition and still earn a profit. Outbidding your rivals may get you the job, but will it pay enough to cover your expenses? On the other hand, holding out for more money may leave you with too little time for delivery, damaging your reputation for on-time service. Maintain your fleet, make the right choices and you'll end up with a garage full of rigs and a pocket full of green.  American Long Haul lets you determine your truck-driving destiny. Get more than 45 types of cargo where it needs to go, including livestock, chemicals and mobile homes. Be sure to factor maintenance and gas in to the equation, or else you'll be stuck with a broken-down truck. That's no way to make cross-country runs across 48 states in North America, as well as Canada and Mexico. Safely reach your destination and back up to the loading dock, just like a real trucker. Successful deliveries mean more money, so rack up the dough you need to buy all 37 mammoth machines and trailers. The open road is waiting  get a move on before someone else gets there first.

Things get ugly as you unleash more than 20 ranged and close-combat weapons through enthralling, destructible environments. Use the Plasma Gun, Bolter, Chainsword and Power Fist, but choose wisely to maximize your power. In multiplayer gameplay, map variants change depending on the size of your party. Pick a side, team up and obliterate whomever you've chosen as your opposition.

SynopsisWith more than 135 video game awards won since 2008, the FIFA Soccer franchise continues to impress, wow and amaze soccer fans around the world. From revolutionary features to thrilling matches on the pitch, FIFA Soccer 12 delivers the same exciting and electric soccer action you've come to expect from this innovative series. Powered by the all-new Player Impact Engine, FIFA Soccer 12 delivers authentic player interactions on the pitch from recovering quickly after a light brush to pushing and pulling during a fight for possession. Team that with Precision Dribbling, which gives you complete control over the ball, and Tactical Defending, which places the importance on positioning, intercepting passes and more, you'll experience 90 minutes of soccer that feels like a true-to-life match. Take on a smarter and more aware CPU that features Pro Player Intelligence, allowing players to make decisions based on their own skills, strengths and attributes, along with varying their attack based on the strengths of the players on the field and the weaknesses of opposing players. Manage injuries in a true-to-life fashion thanks to the Player Impact Engine which monitors contact between players in real-time and detects real injuries by tracking the force of the collision. Risk sending a player onto the pitch who hasn't fully healed or sit him down until he's truly ready  the decision is up to you. Featuring more than 15,000 players and more than 500 officially licensed clubs, FIFA Soccer 12 delivers the most authentic soccer experience to date. Are you ready for a match?

SynopsisYou feel the weight of your sword in your left hand and the delicate balance of your spear in your right. A fierce and daunting warrior charges and you prepare to fight. Just as your attacker comes at you with yet another strike, you throw out a Switch Attack and pierce his armor with your spear. Stunned, he gapes at you from the other end of the wooden stick. The walking Infected have overrun New York City and Officer Stevens is the last line of defense. The chestnuts will have to wait.  Infected launches double-barreled shooter action wrapped in an immersive story with wild humor, vivid characters and imaginative environments. As Officer Stevens, you will battle the lethal Infected with a massive array of weapons, including a special "viral gun" that splatters your enemies like rotten tomatoes. Remove that ugly fence in the background of your otherwise lovely family photograph. Add a unique frame of your own creation. Plaster your walls with poster-size versions of your photographs. The helpful Make It Better tool combines several Photoshop Elements image adjustment dialogs into a single interface, letting you make side-by-side comparisons of color, contrast and brightness adjustments so you can pick the best result for your particular image. MATURE 17+  Blood, Strong Language, Violence Trane, a "toy" graffiti artist with killer street smarts, uncovers powerful secrets about the mayor. Disclosing such controversial information could take his no-name status to near celebrity-like heights. Delivering the message is where it gets tough. He must create an unbelievable tag that will not only catch the eye of every subway goer, but expose the corrupt ways of the city's government. If there was ever a time that graffiti could change the world, it would be now. Whatever obstacles enter his path, such as city authorities or rival graffiti gangs, Trane must prevail and make a tag of a lifetime.  With a revolutionary storyline written by Mark Ecko and featuring the voice of chart-topping hip-hop artist Talib Kweli as Trane, you'll be able to relive cutting-edge urban art. Graffiti isn't your only task, however, and you must protect yourself as you accomplish your mission with different fighting mechanics, including kicking, grappling, punching and improvised weapons. Walk the streets in 11 distinct city environments with 20 gameplay levels. Sneak mode lets you infiltrate areas and avoid capture as you creep through cities. The unique intuition system allows you to find ideal places to tag. With authentic tags from more than 50 real-life graffiti artists, six of whom appear in-game as mentors, you'll work with old-school to present-day designs. Do you have what it takes to get in, get up and get out?

SynopsisThe majestic landscape of Antaloor once again stretches before you. How will you make your mark in this land of excitement and adventure? The world is yours to see in this all-new installment of the beloved RPG, Two Worlds. Journey through a land of mystery as you battle to stand out in not one, but Two Worlds.  Two Worlds II takes you back to Antaloor with more control than ever before. Develop your skills as you choose a class and progress up a huge skill tree of possibilities. Expanded combat opportunities allow you to battle your way through this hostile land with melee attacks, an active blocking system, mounted combat, duel wielding and dirty new tricks to keep your enemies on their toes. As you build your range of battle skills, you can upgrade and enhance your weapon. With the right attention and dedication, you may just turn an ordinary sword into a weapon of infamy. Give your sword a break and decimate enemies with the D.E.M.O.N.S. magic system. Exercise your creativity as you combine elements to produce the perfect spell of destruction. With the opportunity to explore a world filled with action and adventure, you may want to take a breath and challenge yourself with Village Mode. Focus on building and maintaining a community as you complete village-only quests. Explore a world teeming with possibilities or focus on a building a metropolis of your own, the choice is yours. Head out on the adventure of a lifetime in a rich environment and turn Two Worlds II into your virtual home.

SynopsisYou must never lower your guard. Swarms of enemies and massive spacecrafts surround you and the only thing standing between you and certain death is your merch. You deftly maneuver through a 360° battlefield, ruthlessly swinging down your sword and seamlessly raising your gun to dispatch another would-be killer. You're engaged in a battle for your life, and you're sitting on the edge of your seat, totally engrossed in the HD, smooth-as-silk picture of this exhilarating, high-speed robot action with graphics so crisp that the line between game and reality begins to blur.   Hardcore gameplay and an immersive storyline are combined with stunning, vibrant visuals in this HD remastering of the beloved Zone of the Enders series. With the increased aspect ratio from 4:3 to 16:9, upped frame rate from 30 fps to 60 fps, and evolved audio for crisper sound effects, no leaf has been left unturned in bringing Z.O.E into the HD universe. Kojima Productions even teamed up with Sunrise to bring you an impressive introduction sequence that combines artistry and beautiful anime with technical and upscaled CG for an opening that will instantly put you in the zone. Additional trophies and achievements have been added making this a remastering that is sure to leave you with a satisfying and enthralling gameplay experience.
Talk to your family and friends or send them a text message with this mobile phone that features a built-in 2.0-megapixel camera and video share capabilities to share your photos and videos.

SynopsisExperience all the thrilling action in the Left 4 Dead: Game of the Year Edition. The world has been overrun by creatures of horror, and you are one of only a handful of surviving humans. From the eerie, remote countryside to the asphalt expanse of shadowy urban centers, the streets and fields teem with zombies and mutants intent on the destruction of all humans. Harness your weapons and prepare for the fight of your life as you struggle to destroy the monstrous creatures before they destroy you.  Left 4 Dead deposits you in a terrifying modern world swarming with zombies and "Boss Infected" mutants with horrifying superhuman abilities. Team up with up to three additional players in Survivor Co-op mode as you assume the role of Survivors struggling against your own potentially imminent extinction, completing four sprawling campaigns, each with five new maps that will take you into both deadly urban environments and sinister rural areas. When you're traveling to another country or conversing with a friend or business client in another language, you need to be able to speak intelligently and comprehensively on a wide variety of topics. You get off the plane in Germany, and need to ask someone for directions to your hotel. Your uncle from Dresden wants to hear your opinion on the latest election. You go to a high-class restaurant in Berlin and want to order a beer. Flash cards and repetitive translation tasks are nice, but they don't provide you with the ability to speak and interact with the ease of a native. Immersing yourself in German like it's your first language will  and that's what you can achieve with Rosetta Stone: German Level 1, 2 & 3.  Featuring a proven Dynamic Immersion Method, Rosetta Stone uses native speakers, images, intuition and interactive activities to completely immerse you in German  without using your native language as a crutch. Master all of the basic vocabulary, conversational skills, pronunciation, reading and writing that you need to navigate through the new language, then expand your knowledge to ably converse about emotions and opinions, politics, religion and more. As you practice real-life simulations, Rosetta Stone monitors your progress through voice-recognition technology and gives you feedback for improvement. Language doesn't have to be a barrier  navigate through the basics with ease so you can enjoy conversation to the fullest.

SynopsisFrom the fateful day when he survived the Killing Curse and received his scar to the face-off with You-Know-Who in the Tri-Wizard Tournament, to the harrowing battle atop the Astronomy Tower, the life of Harry Potter has been an extraordinary one  even for a wizard. And you've been there for every spell, every potion, every secret and every dark twist. Now, travel with Harry on his quest to discover and destroy Voldemort's Horcruxes  and face his ultimate destiny on an epic adventure to defeat the enemy who has haunted him, and the entire world, from the very beginning. Travel beyond the passageways of Hogwarts and into winding city streets, the isolated wilderness and wizarding locations of legend as you become the Boy Who Lived on the journey that's the beginning of the end. Will he go down in history as the man who saved the wizarding world  or the boy who became Voldemort's ultimate kill?  Apparate into the wizarding world for the most challenging adventure yet in Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows Part 1: The Videogame. A terrifying and powerful combination of Death Eaters, Snatchers and Dementors is fighting to stop your quest  and will stop at nothing to see that the Boy Who Lived ceases to exist. This time, you have more power than ever to defeat these dark foes, with the ability to mix potent potions, unleash cunning curses and even utilize trees, tables and other everyday objects as weapons. Don the Invisibility Cloak, choke down Polyjuice Potion and employ the power of Peruvian Instant Darkness Powder as you battle evil forces and sneak through eerie environments on a quest to find and destroy the Horcruxes of Tom Riddle. Experience the innovation and the total immersion of an HD-enhancing game engine that works with your system to deliver visceral action and stunning graphics. Wizarding landmarks have never been so vivid, the challenge has never been more dangerous and the action has never felt more real. As the seventh year draws to a close, the hunt begins  and the real struggle is only starting.

SynopsisWilliam Redmoor is the recent recipient of a drastic new brain operation to cure the never-ending nightmare in his mind. As an inmate at the Bright Dawn Treatment Center, a secret hospital for the criminally insane, he is under the care of a mysterious figure known only as The Doctor. Trying to understand how he got here, Redmoor begins to remember  his wife was murdered, and all the evidence points to him as the killer  but the details are hazy. The grotesque treatments against his psychosis seemed to have been working, however, the demons he once fought have returned to torment him. The Doctor has begun his tortuous diabolical experiments on the other inmates in the facility, forcing William to not only slay the monsters that haunt his mind but prevent The Doctor from achieving his goal. Is the madness that surrounds William real or is it all in his head?  Dementium II is an exciting horror adventure that places you inside a secret asylum for the criminally insane in the role of William Redmoor. Arm yourself with revolvers, shotguns, daggers, sledgehammers and bonesaws to defend yourself against more than 16 horrifying creatures. Walk down the foreboding corridors and see the blood-strewn walls designed to immerse you in this nightmarish environment. Overpower and kill guards to fight your way to The Doctor and free yourself from the horror that has enslaved your mind.

CONSUMER ALERT Most users do not need a license to operate this wireless microphone system. Nevertheless, operating this microphone system without a license is subject to certain restrictions: the system may not cause harmful interference; it must operate at a low power level (not in excess of 50 milliwatts); and it has no protection from interference received from any other device. Purchasers should also be aware that the FCC is currently evaluating use of wireless microphone systems, and these rules are subject to change. SynopsisYou slink quietly, deftly through the landscape, stalking your prey. You know he's around somewhere; you stole a glance of his red wing streaking past, if only for a second. You peer into your device  the only one that can detect the strange creatures you chase  and pinpoint your prey who's armed with fierce claws and threatening spikes. But you don't even break a sweat. With an arsenal of powerful new combat moves and an accomplice waiting close by for backup, you know you're ready to handle anything this invizimal throws at you.  The thrill of the chase is back and better than before in Invizimals: Shadow Zone. Raising the ante and introducing new challenges, new colleagues and stunning new abilities, the sequel to the original award-winning Invizimals transports you back into the secret world of mysterious monsters for an adventure like never before. This time, you have a new mission as you hunt for the magical creatures: bring together a team of the most elite invizimal hunters and form an Alliance that will change everything. Find an ally you can trust and work together in an all-new co-op capture mode, and soon you'll be snagging more invizimals than ever. Once you build an arsenal of monsters use your new combat skills to win tournaments and earn the ability to mutate and customize your invizimals. To the world, they're invisible. But to you, armed with your PSP camera and trap card, they're crystal clear  and the key to your success.

SynopsisThis street is quiet. Too quiet. You train your eyes on one of the only two points of entry. Surely this will be the way the enemy comes in for the assault. As soon as you've brought your weapon to the ready, you hear the whizzing noise of a bullet flying past, inches from your ear. Suddenly the building to your right bursts into an explosion that sends you flying through the air. You smash into the opposite building with a resounding thud. You lie there helpless, watching bits of the crumbled wall roll toward you. You have to get up. You have to keep fighting. A fallen comrade lays beside you and you know you must drag him to safety if he's going to survive. You have to do this. Lives depend on it. Welcome to the Battlefield.  Prima Games' official strategy guide to Battlefield 3 takes you through every heart-pounding battle, every perilous map and every gut-wrenching mission. Learn everything you can about your weapon of choice, as well as a complete breakdown of all classes in the game. Labeled maps call out every waypoint, vehicle and fixed turret location, and teamwork tactics help your squad effectively take down the enemy. When you're ready to take the fight online, expert strategies assist you in every multiplayer map. With this game guide, you won't have to step into battle unprepared.

SynopsisIn modern-day Japan, a terrible plague has beset the land. Demons are running rampant, miring the nation in chaos and casting its people into a world of darkness and fear. It falls upon you and your team to navigate a landscape beset with corruption and mental frailty in order to prevent this strange alternate reality from taking hold. Will your efforts be enough to restore order back to the world?  Shin Megami Tensei: Persona brings the dark, complex world of this acclaimed RPG to PSP in a completely remastered edition. Relive the beginning of the Persona series, with enhancements that include a fully relocalized script, revamped user interface, faster battles, expanded soundtrack and new in-game movies with voice work added specifically for the North American release. Rely on the Demon Negotiation system to enhance your collection of the inner selves known as Personas, adding skills and depth to your battle tactics so you can more ably take on the threats shadowing this gripping alternative modern world.
Experience a sharp, high-pitched attack with fast decay using this Zildjian ZXT18MTC 18" ZXT crash cymbal that features a bright, full-bodied design and provides excellent projection.

SynopsisTravel back to an era of relentless territorial expansion and near-perpetual war; an era where one ruthless and brilliant commander could control the fate of an entire continent and the entire world. The Age of Imperialism and the Napoleonic Age reign, and around the world the seas are filled with ships belonging to the superpowers of the day. Take to the high seas for extraordinary 3D naval combat as you prove you have the daring and determination it takes to conquer the globe  at any cost.  In this incredible collection of the Total War franchise, you'll take command of single ships or vast fleets for exhilarating real-time naval warfare, then take the helm as Napoleon as you relive his daring conquests as Empire: Total War and Napoleon: Total War unite. Pound your enemies with the power of your mighty cannons, then board enemy ships and engage in exciting hand-to-hand combat as you expand your fleet on the most epic campaign map yet. Carve the way into a new continent and use your power to help found the United States on a gripping episodic mission. Once you've conquered new territory, return to the waters to experience the ruthless battles of Napoleon's quest for power, through three campaigns across Italy, Egypt and all of Europe  from early victories to crushing defeat at Waterloo. Go headtohead against a friend online and vie for total domination. Can you defeat those who stand in your way as you rise to power in the high seas?

SynopsisJourney to a land that is both known and unknown. The distant land of Albion that you discovered in Fable is no longer the same. Five centuries have passed since you last visited, and the land to which you've returned is more complex than you remember it. Every act has meaning, and in this magical land, you're the hero of your own epic story. How will your fable end?  Even more thrilling and engrossing than its predecessor, Fable II is a fantasy role-playing game filled with action and excitement around every corner. It builds on the core gameplay theme of the original, but offers more choices and ways for you to carve out your own path. Albion sprawls before you in a vast, open world, inviting you to roam freely through the countryside and explore the many dungeons, catacombs and more scattered throughout the kingdom. Play as either a male or female and live your life exactly as you choose. Get married, have children or buy a castle  the choice is yours. Remember that every choice has consequences, and the world around you will evolve in unique ways in response to your decisions.

SynopsisIt's been three years since Lightning and the rest of the crew saved Cocoon in Final Fantasy XIII. Survivors have started rebuilding  but Lightning has gone missing and is presumed dead. However, Serah is sure her friend is alive, so when the town is invaded by monsters and a mysterious man named Noel comes to Serah's rescue, together they embark on a transcendental journey to find Lightning. Get ready for the newest installment of the Final Fantasy franchise, Final Fantasy XIII - 2.  Final Fantasy XIII - 2 continues the story of Final Fantasy XIII. After Serah happens to meet a mysterious man named Noel, the two embark on a thrilling journey in search of Lightning. Join the search party and immerse yourself deeper than ever in the adventure as the latest installment of the Final Fantasy series takes player-driven gameplay to new levels. Discover a rich world that's full of fascinating NPCs  and teeming with more than 150 monsters that can help you on your journey. Recruit iconic creatures, such as cactuars, tonberries and behemoths, and train them to become valuable assets on the battlefield. Develop elaborate strategies and take greater command over the paradigms than in the past using the new tuning feature of the Active Time Battle system. This Collector's Edition comes in a beautiful hardcover case featuring illustrations by Yoshitaka Amano to immerse you even deeper in the story. Bring the game off the screen and let the captivating music take you away with the four-disc original soundtrack. Set down the controller and peruse the 20-page artbook to get a good look at remarkable concept art of the game's environments, monsters and weapons. In a world where every decision you make has rippling effects on the story and the fate of the quest, choose your actions wisely  and discover endless replayability. This time, the Fantasy becomes your own.

SynopsisSaturday. To some, it's a day off from work, a day to sleep in, a day to kick back. For you, Saturday is what you train for all week. It's the day that defines whether you'll be celebrated as the new hero of the campus  or the biggest letdown in town. The day when your most heated rival will be laid to rest  or trample on your pride. It's game day. And in the fierce world of college football, it's more than just a game  it's a way of life. Do you have what it takes to go back to school and bring glory to your campus on the field?  Climb into your school colors and hit the stadium for the most authentic college football experience yet in NCAA Football 12. Experience the true emotion of college football with all-new pre-game traditions, including the Sooner Schooner and Ramblin' Wreck, and celebrate exhilarating plays with school-specific icons like Chief Osceola, Uga and Tommy Trojan. Take on the challenge of running a program in the enhanced Dynasty mode that lets you begin your coaching career as a coordinator or take over as a head coach. Rise through the rankings and lead your school to a coveted National Championship. Forever alter the landscape of college football by realigning conferences or constructing new 16-team super conferences. Make an impact on the field as you lead your team down the road to the National Championship and learn what old-school football glory really means.

EVERYONE Cartoon Violence Can Pac-Man really be 25 years old? You have to admit he hasn't aged a bit. Unfortunately, his work is never done, even on special occasions. On the eve of his 25th birthday party, Pac-Man is mysteriously teleported out of Pac-Village and into a dark, unstable world. It turns out the evil genius Erwin has created a machine that can penetrate the Spectral Realm. Now the Spectral Realm is collapsing into the real world, causing a massive upheaval as Erwin unleashes hordes of baddies into the once peaceful Pac-Land. It's up to the birthday boy to save the day.  Pac-Man World 3 takes the eternal hero of the arcade classic into a dazzling new adventure. Pac-Man and his old nemesis-turned-ally, Orson, have to put a stop to an evil plot and save the precious Pac-Land from ruin. Along the way, the duo will encounter a host of ghastly ghosts, monsters and robots plus some unexpected old friends. Awesome new powerups include the Power Ribbon, Super Butt Bounce and Chrome Power, all of which can be super-charged by grabbing special fruits. Pac-Man has come a long way since his gobbling days and can now punch enemies, jump onto walls and do so much more. Pac-Man World 3 includes the original arcade version from 1980 plus an exclusive video interview with the game's creator.

When you open yourself up to a new language, you open yourself up to a new realm of possibility. Traveling to foreign countries is an enjoyable and manageable experience, not a confusing misadventure. Conversations with business colleagues, family members and friends from around the world are fluid and enlightening, not clunky and strained. Whether you're studying abroad in Florence, applying for a job in Milan or negotiating with a colleague from Rome, having a firm grasp on the Italian language can make all the difference. Speak Italian like a native  learn the way you learned your first language through intuition and immersion with the Rosetta Stone: Italian Level 1, 2, 3, 4 & 5 Set learning system.   Studies show that translation exercises don't make language stick because they force you to use your own language as a crutch. Rosetta Stone's unique Dynamic Immersion method teaches you through images, intuition and exposure to native speakers  when you learn Italian in Italian, you'll master the language. Instantly immerse yourself in the most important communication topics, from basic conversational skills like introductions, questions, dates and times to complex issues like politics, business, the arts and media. Prepare yourself for any situation abroad with practical language guidance for purchasing a home, negotiating business transactions, conducting interviews and more. Language doesn't have to be a barrier  master Italian, and let it propel you into a world of opportunities.

SynopsisThe long-awaited and much-anticipated next installment of the award-winning The Elder Scrolls franchise is here. Now, the expansive, open world that forever revolutionized the face of the fantasy epic leads you deeper into the combat, the magic and the myth than you've ever been before. This time, you don't just play as a character, you truly become whomever it is you wish to be  and have the freedom to do anything you can possibly imagine. This follow-up to the 2006 Game of the Year, The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion, offers stunning graphics and a gripping storyline that immerses you in the game from the moment you turn it on. Are you ready to unroll the Scroll and let the journey begin?  Imagine rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields and crumbling dungeons. Imagine ancient dragons beholding secrets so powerful they could transform your future. Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim immerses you in the engrossing world of the franchise you already know and love with more realism, more choice and more intensity than ever before. Featuring a new game engine that brings every tiny environmental aspect to life in blistering detail and AI that brings you close to your allies  and your enemies  Skyrim blurs the line between your world and that of the game. An all-new character engine opens wider an already vast virtual world, putting every decision, every action and every consequence entirely in your hands as you arm yourself with hundreds of new weapons, abilities and spells. This immaculate fifth chapter challenges your skills, immerses your mind and will forever change the way you view gaming. The Collector's Edition features a 12" statue of the World Eater, Alduin, perched atop a dragon wall so you can display your fandom. Peruse 200 pages of full-color illustrations, sketches and models with the in-depth The Art of Skyrim Official Art Book. This detailed coffee table book includes a foreword by game director Todd Howard and commentary from the Bethesda Game Studios artists, and details the characters, creatures, environments and weaponry of the game so you can know the story inside and out. Take a break from the action and get an insider's look into the story, gameplay, setting, legacy of the Elder Scrolls franchise and more with The Making of The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim documentary DVD. It's time to return. It's time for Skyrim.

TEEN Blood, Sexual Themes, Use of Alcohol and Tobacco, Violence The year is 1400 A.D. and you find yourself on a dirty market street in Europe. Life is changing at this time: the final crusade has just ended and the powerful Roman-Catholic Church, as well as many European countries, has been ravished by hundreds of years of war. For the first time, it seems as if the common man has growing opportunities to succeed as the rich turn to him for goods and services, instead of the other way around. You are this common man and now is your chance to prosper. What will your decisions be and what effect will they have on the world? They may be greater than you think.   The Guild 2 is a medieval life simulation RPG. Explore the interactive environment of 1400 A.D. Europe as you begin your story as a poor commoner. Design your character and team up with other characters that all have unique strengths and weaknesses. Choose a career that will quickly bring you power, such as merchant or thief, and develop your character as they become increasingly important. Play either online or by yourself in single-player Story mode. Your decisions will affect you and those around you. If you fail, it will bring suffering to your family and friends.

Studies indicate there is a 1 in 10 chance of your laptop being lost or stolen this year, and that 97 percent are never recovered. Losing your computer can be costly, both financially and in terms of the irreplaceable files and photos you have stored on your hard drive. Don't let this happen to you.  LoJack for Laptops is a patented software-based theft recovery service that tracks, locates and recovers stolen laptop and desktop computers. When a computer is protected with this service, software installed on the machine works behind the scenes to silently and securely contact the Monitoring Center. If stolen, it reports its location using any Internet connection. When your laptop or desktop is stolen, the Recovery Team tracks its location and engages local law enforcement to recover and return the computer within 30 days, guaranteed.

When you practice your skills in real-life simulations, Rosetta Stone uses voice recognition to monitor your progress and give you feedback. Don't let language be a barrier  cross any boundaries with Rosetta Stone.

SynopsisYou've constructed massive columns of blocks on either side of the screen, just waiting for the single straight piece to come through. That piece will be the key to reeling off bonus after bonus, and clearing your 3DS screen in the process. As each block appears on screen, you begin to get nervous that the block you need may not show up. The columns rise higher and you're starting to run out of space to store these excess pieces. Just when it seems like all hope is lost, the straight block pops on screen  and appears to jump off the screen. You flip it and drop it into the space you've carefully created. The lines disappear, bonuses explode off the screen and you smile as another straight block appears.  You'll flip for joy with the arrival of the block-building, line-clearing thrills of Tetris on the Nintendo 3DS. In Tetris Axis, the traditional Tetris gameplay you've come to know and love combines with innovative new features and eye-popping 3D visuals for a whole new puzzle experience. Featuring more than 20 awesome game modes, including Marathon, Computer Battle, Fever and Survival modes, you'll be able to hop into familiar gameplay and all-new fast-paced excitement. Take on friends and family in the same room, across the street or around the world in Local, Download Play and Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection game modes with support for up to eight players. Clear lines in fun-filled Party game modes, including Stage Racer Plus, Shadow Wide, Jigsaw, Tower Climber and more. Enjoy a unique challenge by using your 3DS' cameras and the world around you to play in AR Marathon and AR Tower Climber Augmented Reality game modes. With stereoscopic 3D, brilliant graphics and special effects, Tetris Axis takes the block-building franchise to a new dimension on the Nintendo 3DS.

With the push of a button, the Autobots were called to arms and moved into their battle positions. The war for Earth was about to start. Given the choice, which side would you fight for? Take on your enemies in head-to-head combat, using your character's unique fighting techniques and special moves. SynopsisLurch ahead to a not-so-distant, but incredibly unsettling future  a future where everyday people are morphed into super-enhanced beings; a future where dark secrets lurk beneath the veins of America; a future that might just be leading to something even worse. Adam Jensen thought he was working for the good guys. Handpicked to protect an advanced biotechnological firm, he was designing plans to keep top scientists safe. He was helping his country, or so he thought. But now, a black ops team has burst into the firm, massacred the scientists and initiated a dark plot  using the very plans he designed. With a weary world now teetering on the edge of a sinister conspiracy that threatens to twist the evolution of the human race, Adam Jensen is the only person who can uncover the plot and stop a Revolution before it's too late.  Deus Ex: Human Revolution transports you to the turning point of the human venture  the time and place just before the chilling events of Deus Ex  and gives you the power to decide the outcome as you become Adam Jensen. Plunge into an eerily majestic future where Renaissance elements meld with futuristic technology in mind-blowing images as you travel around the globe on an international caper. Rich and deeply imagined RPG immersion combines with realistic first-person combat to drag you into the future as you battle the thugs, special operations soldiers and robots who threaten your journey  and your life. An arsenal of more than 20 weapons and opportunities to enhance your character empower your struggle, but beware  every decision you make has consequences that affect the entire human race. Will you stop the conspiracy, or will a grim Revolution forever change the world as we know it?

SynopsisFor millennia, the concept of hell has captivated saints and sinners alike. And for centuries, the Western world's image of hell has found its inspiration in the compelling 14th-century epic poem "The Divine Comedy." Drawn from part one of this revered work of literature, Dante's Inferno thrusts you into the darkly imagined world of the nine circles of hell, and this Divine Edition intensifies your journey with a variety of diabolical extras. Step into a nightmarish realm where you'll confront hideous monsters and your own shadowed past, and see if you can withstand the cruel punishments of hell.  Based on part one of Dante Alighieri's enduring "The Divine Comedy," chronicling Dante's journey through hell in pursuit of his beloved Beatrice, Dante's Inferno sets you on a twisted course through the menacing nine circles of hell. Face up to the consequences of your own sins and your unforgivable war crimes as you traverse the realms of limbo, lust, gluttony, greed, anger, heresy, violence, fraud and treachery. Battle increasingly fierce and dangerous monsters as you come closer to your goal, and seek both vengeance and redemption within the snare of hell's dark fires. This special Divine Edition comes complete with a legion of exciting extras, including a free Dark Forest PDLC pack, a developer documentary, a Wayne Barlowe digital art book, a 20-song game soundtrack and a digital version of the complete Longfellow translation of Dante Alighieri's "Inferno."

Turok: Evolution is a prequel that takes you back to the origins of the Turok lineage. In the beginning, hero Tal'Set is fighting his nemesis Captain Tobias Bruckner in 1886 Texas. During the battle, a rift between their world and the Lost Lands opens and Tal'Set is sucked into it. Injured and near death, Tal'Set is nursed back to health by the natives of the River Village, a colony in hiding from the Lost Land's greatest threat  the Lord Tyrannus and his reptilian hordes. Bent on a holy mission to purify the land through slaughter and misery, Tyrannus appoints a new general to his armies, and Tal'Set discovers to his horror that it is Bruckner, who was also swept into the Lost Lands through the rift.  Turok: Evolution is an epic adventure of treachery, exploration and war in a land of suspended cities, mysterious temples, reptile armies and towering dinosaurs amongst lush jungles. Plants move as dinosaurs brush against them and trees sway in the wind in the living environments with destructible objects. Shoot down trees onto enemies and collapse massive rock spires onto dinosaurs in gameplay that combines stealth and action, directed by context-sensitive, mission-based sequences. Unleash all-new weapons, each with unique traits and damage, including Variable Payload Cruise Missiles, Gravity Disrupter Beams and the Swarm Bore. The terror has evolved.

SynopsisFor decades, one name has defined NFL gaming and authentic football immersion. Rich with the strategy, emotion and raw aggression that encapsulates the NFL, that name is Madden. No matter what colors they paint their faces on game day, all of the fans know where to turn for intricate playbooks, accurately rendered players, intense rivalry matchups and everything else they see on Sunday. Lower your shoulder and prepare to experience bone-crunching hits, the scramble for a loose ball and the pulse-pounding rush of fighting for every yard. Feel the inexplicable high of bursting through the line for a 40-yard dash, or intercepting a pass before it gets to the star receiver. Get ready to immerse yourself in the exciting NFL action when you step under center in Madden NFL 12, and experience the grit and immediacy that you've come to expect from this revolutionary series. Now, lace up for a new season and prove that your team can rise to gridiron glory in Madden NFL 12.  Break the huddle with purpose, read the field at the line of scrimmage and dominate your opponents as you get ready for a gritty, uncompromising pro football experience that's better than ever. Get closer to NFL action than ever before in the latest, most game-authentic Madden yet. Continuing the rich tradition of the Madden NFL franchise, Madden NFL 12 features all 32 NFL teams, stadiums and your favorite players to remain true to the game and bring you closer than ever to the field. Get ready to relive the most memorable moments from the 2010 NFL season and become a hero or spoiler while trying to match the best performances of the year. Construct your own dynasty from the ground up and make a run at becoming a legendary franchise over 30 full seasons in Franchise mode. Design a playbook that suits your playing style as you master the X's and O's and create custom plays for any situation. From a precise passing attack to a power running game and devastating blitzes from the weak side  Madden NFL 12 gives you the ability to change the momentum from the sideline. Get ready for intense rivalries, agonizing defeats and stunning victories. If it happens on Sunday, it happens every day in your living room with Madden NFL 12.

SynopsisAs members of the elite peacekeeping force Dead Echo, Grayson Hunt and Ishi Sato fear deception within the ranks and decide to strike out on their own. In their quest for cash, these former mercenaries come upon their ex-commander's warship. Outmanned and outarmed, Grayson decides that the only option is to attack the Ulysses head-on in a suicidal mission. Barely surviving a crash landing, Hunt and Sato now find themselves isolated on an abandoned planet, surrounded by packs of mutants and flesh-eating gangs. Will they be able to escape the planet alive and take out their revenge?  Bulletstorm places you in the role of Grayson Hunt, a former mercenary-turned-space pirate, stranded on the deserted paradise planet of Stygia. Surrounded by hordes of mutants and flesh-eating gangs, you must fight to survive and claim revenge on the man who has marooned you here. Kill enemies with style and skill as you rack up points that you can use to upgrade your skillshots  allowing you to decimate your enemies in more creative ways. Combine your slaying style with an arsenal of high-tech weaponry that allows you to deal death in a powerful and explosive manner. Travel across the desolate planet from the scorched deserts to tropical forests to an adult playground resort, all delivered by the power of the Unreal Engine.

You are a next-generation illegal street racer at large in the cities of Paris, Los Angeles or Tokyo. The police are on to you so you'll have to drive better, smarter and faster than ever before. You know how to transform a piece of music with the slightest EQ adjustments. You can pick out the exact moments where an out-of-tune voice ruins the overall effect. You hear the frequency bands that most people would miss  and know how to boost them up to enhance the performance. You don't just listen to music  you analyze every minute detail, from equalization to formant and compression. You can pick out the subtle hum, rumble, crackling and other flaws that would float right by the average listener. You've got the expertise, the passion and the creative energy to craft the perfect tracks, but to truly reach the Peak of your mastering career, you need a toolset that's as detail-oriented as you. Vastly comprehensive and intricately fine-tuned, Peak Studio XT delivers a complete and advanced software suite designed for professionals, taking you through the entire mastering process  and taking it to the next level.   From mix analysis to pitch correction, equalization, noise reduction and beyond, this collection of audio plug-ins puts cutting-edge tools at your fingertips and empowers you to carry your creative vision into the airwaves. This single software suite includes all of the advanced editing features of Peak Studio, and expands the possibilities with the addition of SoundSoap 2, SoundSoap Pro 2 and the Master Perfection Suite. Background noise, rumble, crackling and other distractions disappear from your files right before your eyes when you process them through the award-winning SoundSoap 2 and SoundSoap Pro 2 plug-ins. With the click of a button, you'll watch as noise visually drops right out of the audio signal. Get even closer to the intricate details of your tracks with the analysis tools of the Reveal plug-in in the Master Perfection Suite. The seven tools monitor audio levels, pan, phase and spectral characteristics and display the data on visual mini screens so you know exactly what you're working with. When you've collected your information, comprehensive controls across the Suite allow you to fine-tune the pitch, apply equalization to multiple bands, set up a noise gate to eliminate certain frequencies and apply compression or expansion. If you're working with multiple tracks, the package isn't complete until each track complements the next. With Repli-Q, you can automatically apply the best spectral qualities of each track to the entire set list, creating a consistent tonal quality throughout. You're driven to achieve professionally mastered sound  reach the Peak of your talent with Peak Studio XT.

SynopsisYou've battled enemy forces in sweeping multiplayer campaigns, mastered complex combat techniques and blasted level caps to smithereens. But just when you thought you knew everything there was to know about the action genre, an unprecedented force has seized the gaming world  and forever revolutionized the art of combat. Step into a realm that rivals your own in realism, detail and freedom, and lose yourself in the epic quest that's destined to rewrite the pages of gaming history. In this world where mythical creatures roam at large and merciless enemies threaten to murder your ambition, you make the decisions  and you suffer the consequences.  Envisioned by the masterminds behind Resident Evil 4 and Devil May Cry 4, Dragon's Dogma redefines the action genre, immersing you deeper than ever into the inner workings of an open world. A fierce warrior, you've set out on a perilous campaign to track down and destroy an enigmatic, bloodthirsty dragon. But you're not alone. A party of three independently fighting pawns back up your mission, offering their own individual strengths and weaknesses to the battlefield. Manage your allies carefully, choosing one to constantly train at your side, and reserving the others for when they're needed most. If you're willing, offer to share your pawn with a friend via Xbox LIVE, and you just may benefit from your generosity. In this mythical realm, goblins, griffins and dragons abound, but beware  Dragon's Dogma is no fairytale. These creatures of lore appear in their truest, most grisly forms, stirring at different hours of the day and night to impose an ever-unpredictable challenge. As you delve deeper into the storyline, you must master the most intricate details of combat  down to the weight of your sword, material of your armor and placement of your strike  in order to complete the mission with your life. Featuring a richly detailed environment, hundreds of fully voiced NPCs and an uncanny 24-hour day/night cycle, this gripping new franchise isn't just a game  it will become your Dogma.

Whether you've been out of elementary school for only a few years or quite a bit longer, the TV game show Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader? tests your recall of facts you may not even have thought about since you were 10 years old. Now, in this fast-paced game based on the hit show, you can prove once and for all that you're older and wiser  or that you never should have gotten past 5th grade in the first place.  Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader?: Make the Grade is the exciting sequel to the Are You Smarter Than a 5th Grader? video game, presenting you with an array of new and challenging questions. Every question comes from the grade school curriculum, so by all rights you should be able to ace them all  providing you actually retained all that elementary school-level learning. Answer any of more than 6,000 questions in 23 grade school-appropriate subjects and see if you have what it takes to triumph in a challenging game where the answers are all too elementary.

TEEN Blood, Mild Language, Violence World War II has called you to duty to fight for your country. With the harsh realities of death and despair sinking in, you must prevail. Nothing must stop you from victory, not even the sight or smell of death. As part of America's most decorated and heroic fighting unit, The Big Red One, you'll work together with your squad mates to accomplish highly dangerous combat missions spanning North Africa, Italy and Nazi-occupied Western Europe. You'll be forced to destroy the lives of your enemies while building new relationships with your squad members. The realities of life pull you in every direction, but nothing can stop the First Division.  Incredible cinematic intensity creates a true-to-life gameplay experience. You'll battle on land, sea and in the air, experiencing blistering desert heat and the deadly countryside of Europe. War has torn the world apart and artillery explosions shake the ground you walk upon. Safety exists nowhere. With the aid of more than three dozen authentic weapons, you must keep moving forward regardless of the casualties. Bound together trough the chaos of battle, your squad is all that you have left. Through all-new artificial intelligence and animation, your allies (and enemies) have gotten smarter. You'll need to effectively make use of environmental cover and tactical maneuvers, such as flanking, envelopment and fire-and-maneuver behaviors, if you wish to survive the hazards of war.

SynopsisIt's up to you to command an elite multinational fighting team in battle. Traveling deep into enemy territory, your squad will perform top secret missions and employ subversive fighting tactics. They are the best of the best and it's up to you to bring their skills together in combat. Assess each team member's skills before each mission and make sure you've got the right team with you for each specific objective.  This WWII adventure drops you into the heart of battle and gives you the tools to claw your way out. Play as either Axis soldiers or fight for the Allies in two nonlinear campaigns set in Europe during 1943. Choose your team from a pool of 40 soldiers from 30 different countries and equip them with weapons ranging from daggers to rocket launchers. Victory or defeat depends on your ability to select the right bunch of people for each life-and-death mission.

SynopsisCertification notwithstanding, take off in this simulated flight fantasy and gain a firsthand look into the role of a first-class pilot-in-command. Jet-setting is totally redefined. With plenty of new aircraft to choose from, including the AirCreation 582SL Ultralight and the Maule M7-260C Orion, virtual pilots of all skill levels will experience the exhilaration of world travel along with the adrenaline-drenched challenges of high-stakes aviation. Twenty-five years of the landmark Flight Simulator franchise soars to treacherous new heights in its 10th edition and most ambitious release to date.  New technological advancements, incredibly realistic graphics and convincing obstacles, including unpredictable weather and the changing seasons, ensure a totally immersive experience. Watch moving cars and detailed buildings scattered in cities, indigenous houses, farmland, livestock, and wildlife in its natural habitat from an aerial view. Choose from 30 new missions to refine your aviation skills and respond to more stimulating experiences while in flight. Compete in the Red Bull Air Race or bring relief material to the Congo, keeping track of your progress on each mission. Elevated multiplayer gameplay enables you to communicate with air traffic control or act as a controller for your fellow pilots, while increased online capabilities let you interact with other aviators from around the globe by chatting in real time via your headset and keyboard.

SynopsisYou've trained for years to compete in the ultimate sword-fighting contest. This is your destiny. You've honed your skills, mastered carving, sparring, blocking and more, and still need to advance before you can prove you are the master of the blade. Your sensei and adopted father, Sensei Musashi, has prepared you for the tournament. Staying alert and quick on your feet will assist you as you take down the greatest from the past, present and future. Are you ready to become the greatest sword fighter of all time?  Swords pits you against the best to carry the blade from the past, present and future. Wield your Wii Remote with Wii MotionPlus to experience true 1:1 sword movement, real-time blocking and advanced combos. Face off against eight unique bosses, each with distinct looks and home arenas that complement their fighting styles. From a Viking chieftain sporting a large sword to Sir Lancelot brandishing a broadsword and a shield to the swift and dangerous Princess Aisha, your opponents are fierce. You will need speed, agility and swift thinking to make it to the Final Showdown. With every victory, you'll earn a new sword with its own individual abilities. Learn new combos and increase your skills in training challenges, including carving, sparring, blocking and battling a horde of zombies. Grab a friend and throw down a challenge to an epic battle of your own or play together in two-player mode. Do you have what it takes to defeat the undefeatable?

SynopsisEvery day you wake up thinking that this day will be the same as yesterday  until today. You step outside your door and find yourself leading armies of pint-sized soldiers in a battle  for fungus? Then, you're transported to the driver's seat of a radio-controlled car as it careens around dangerous curves and pulls off crazy stunts. Just when you start to wonder what's going on, you're plunged into darkness and behind the controls of an excavator, exploring the shadowy subterranean world. Out of nowhere a monster appears behind you and begins to give chase. You press the accelerator to the floor, but the machine won't move any faster. Just as the terrifying being is about to close in, you find yourself blinded by the sun as you glide effortlessly across the sea. Your wakeboard carves through the glass-like water, and the crowd cheers you on. Turns out this day wouldn't be like every other one, thanks to this Action Pack.  4-in-1 Action Pack delivers four classic downloadable games to your PlayStation 3 in one convenient package. Featuring wave-jumping, dirt-digging, strategy-planning and high-speed fun, this Action Pack expands your PlayStation 3 gameplay with a variety of engaging games that will keep you coming back for more. Pick up your controller and lead your miniature army into battle to expand your empire in Mushroom Wars. The gameplay mechanics are easy to learn, but offer plenty of complexity and replayability for strategy fans. Take hold of the wheel and race for the checkered flag or nail high-flying stunts in the no-holds-barred radio-controlled racing of Smash Cars. Strap into your board and hold onto the rope as you're about to fly around wet and wild tracks, perform adrenaline-pumping tricks, collect bonuses and avoid dangers like exploding mines and bloodthirsty sharks in Wakeboarding HD. Finally, climb into a little construction vehicle in a remake of an 80s classic in Digger HD. Explore the underground world as you excavate the earth horizontally and vertically to create your own path while avoiding dangerous monsters and collecting powerups, jewels, coins and more. SynopsisYou're the leader of a small squad of Allied soldiers deep behind enemy lines, carrying out secret missions during WWII. SynopsisYou watch as your teammate rolls the dice and hold in a sigh of regret. One number less and you would rake it in big time. You hold three railroads in the palm of your hand: one more and you hit the jackpot. You grab the ivory cubes and toss them down, waiting for the fateful number. Will you finally score the Reading Railroad or be doomed to a rent-paying future?  Monopoly Streets reinvigorates the classic game of fortune in a whole new format. Explore the streets of your favorite town as you journey from the cheap motels of Baltic Avenue to the ritzy Boardwalk suites and more. Watch your fortunes rise and fall as your player headquarters change from a luxurious mansion to a dilapidated hut  and back, if you're lucky. Feeling competitive? Use your street smarts to auction off your properties and break your rivals' banks, or even challenge players worldwide in exciting online play. You set the standards with the opportunity to set and save house rules  play longer, shorter or whatever way you want. Play in classic game mode, explore new game twists in Monopoly City and Monument City or download extra themed boards and tokens online for changing adventures that keep you passing "Go" over and over again. Jump into the excitement of this classic game but watch out  once you reach the top, there's nowhere to go but back down.

SynopsisYou spot your target just a few feet away, as you crouch just behind the rustling blades of long Savannah grass. You fumble for your trigger, heart pounding wildly  will your shot find its mark or will you become dinner for the pride? SynopsisIt was a dark and stormy night. Storming snow, to be exact. Blasting winds and blinding gusts of white snow ravaged the quaint New England town where writer Nathaniel Hawthorne was sleeping  and then he met his early demise. It was May. Now, the ghost of the influential 19th-century figure is knocking on your door  demanding help uncovering the murky circumstances of his untimely death. The facts are twisted, the evidence is buried, the truth is obscured  and the clues you uncover will open up the doors to yet another mystery surrounding the Salem Witch trials. Can you unravel the dark secrets of the past and solve two of the eeriest cases in early American history? The adventure of your lifetime lies in the past  where double the toil and trouble are brewing.

SynopsisTake on the role of Nancy Drew and solve two award-winning mysteries for the price of one. Nancy Drew Double Dare 5 sends you off on two exciting cases: Nancy Drew: Danger by Design and Nancy Drew: The Creature of Kapu Cave. Danger by Design sends Nancy off to Paris to work undercover for a famous fashion designer, Minette. But all is not well in this Parisian paradise: Minette's behavior has grown more and more strange as time has passed. She never used to fire people at random, throw tantrums or wear that mask. Rumors have begun to link her studio with secret tunnels under Paris and strange threats have been whispered. It's up to Nancy to help Minette complete her collection in time.  The Creature of Kapu Cave finds you joining Nancy as she travels to Hawaii as a research assistant to Dr. Quigley Kim. A scourge has stricken the locals' lucrative pineapple crop, subsequently sparking a rumor around the island that a local research compound has awoken the legendary Kane Okala. Upon her arrival, Nancy discovers the camp has been ravaged beyond recognition and that Dr. Kim is missing. Luckily, Nancy has the Hardy Boys in tow to help her complete the top-secret mission, but it's ultimately up to her to unravel the intricate web of mysteries. Assume the role of Nancy, the Hardy Boys or switch back and forth between characters during certain sequences throughout the game. Driven by an intriguing storyline, you'll be enthralled with Hawaiian lore, a forbidden cave, ecosystem disruptions and more.

SynopsisFor nearly 30 years, the battle-tested A-10A has served as a major close air support aircraft for the U.S. Air Force, Air National Guard and Reserves. The A-10C takes all the impressive features of the A-10A and kicks it up a notch  creating the ideal air support aircraft for the 21st century. Now, it's your turn to strap yourself into the cockpit and give the bird a fly in DCS: A-10C Warthog. With advanced equipment and weapons systems, the Warthog is ready to take on waves of land, air and sea forces  and, of course, do what it was built to do: destroy tanks in a conventional force-on-force battlefield. Are you?  DCS: A-10C Warthog puts you in the cockpit of one well-armed, battle-tested bird in this flight simulation. Provide close air support as you fly through loads of heart-pounding missions in the Caucasus region of the Black Sea and take out air, land and sea forces. Use the Mission and Campaign Editors to create your own missions, or go for a more relaxing flight in Game mode. The newer Warthog keeps everything you love about the older A-10A, including engines, communications and more, while upgrading the equipment to meet 21st-century standards. Multifunction Color Displays (MFCD), GPS-guided weapons and data-link support ensure that you stay on top during today's toughest missions. Blast enemies to smithereens using precision attack weapons, like Maverick, JDAM and laser-guided bombs. The A-10C Warthog is easy to fly and offers a stable weapons platform, so you control the battle from your cockpit. Your forces on the ground are in a jam and are calling for air support. Give them what they want.

SynopsisYou are the ultimate weapon. With your powers of regeneration and your indestructible adamantium claws, you are a force to be reckoned with. And with your feral instincts and epic rage fueling your actions, you are virtually unstoppable. You are Wolverine, and in the battles to come you are unafraid to take on the seemingly impossible  and unwilling to leash your desire to exact your revenge.  X-Men Origins: Wolverine, based on the feature film, gives you the chance to delve into Wolverine's tragic past and discover how he came to be such an awe-inspiring weapon. Set off on a hunt that will bring you face-to-face with some of the most famous and notorious characters in the Marvel universe, including Gambit, Sabretooth and The Blob. Unleash more than 100 moves and attacks that give you full control of Wolverine's adamantium claws, and use your feral senses to gain a tactical advantage in battle. Take staggering risks that will have you plummeting to earth without a parachute, lunging through helicopter blades and more, and watch as Wolverine's regeneration abilities mend bone and tissue in real time, leaving you ready for the next attack.

MATURE 17+  Blood, Strong Language, Violence You are a heroic cop named John McClane in an all-new Die Hard storyline. It's up to you to protect your daughter and the innocent citizens of Los Angeles from harm. Experience the intense action of this first-person shooter. You'll have an arsenal of awesome weaponry at your disposal as well as dual weapon capability. Die Hard: Vendetta gives you unparalleled character interaction, beautiful graphics and jaw-dropping in-game mechanics.  This game is intense  you can take on multiple bad guys at once as you squeeze off six rounds before they even get off a single shot. You can overpower the enemy with guns, but you can also trick them with stealthy moves like traps and hostages. And the entire time you'll have Officer Powell by your side  the actual voice of the actor from the original movie.

SynopsisHave you ever dreamed of becoming a famous hip-hop producer? Living the life of a hip-hop all-star takes more than just good looks. You've got to have the tightest beats, the hippest rhymes, all the right connections and the ability to fight for your honor to make your way to the top. Def Jam: Icon combines all these elements for a stunning, musically charged combat experience.  Join Ludacris, T.I., Paul Wall, The Game, Big Boi and more as they take to the streets and fight to the music. Interactive environments react to your music, so steer clear of objects that come to life, such as exploding gas pumps and spinning helicopter propellers, while you put the smack down on your opponent. With an all-new, next-generation street fighting system, use your analog sticks as turntables to add beats, switch songs and fight with your music. The My Soundtrack feature lets you import your own MP3 songs and they will become your weapons. Def Jam: Icon challenges you to rise to the top. Learn more about Metro 2033. (Flash demo) SynopsisIt's the year 2033 and Earth has become a wasteland, destroyed by an apocalyptic event 20 years earlier. In Moscow, those who survived fled to the subways where they live in darkness, fighting against their fellow dwellers and the mutants who prowl the Earth's surface. Raised underground, you must journey to the surface on a mission to warn survivors of an impending threat. Isolated from the poisonous surroundings by your gas mask, you will journey through a dark and menacing world from forgotten catacombs to an abandoned wasteland where you must warn mankind of impending doom. If you fail this mission, mankind will be no more.  Metro 2033 tells a bleak tale of a post-apocalyptic world in the not-so-distant future where survivors have been driven underground by the poisonous air and mutant terrors that stalk the surface. In the role of Artyom, you will brave the outside for the first time on a mission that will decide the fate of the human race. Slink through the enveloping darkness of the tunnels, where horrifying mutants hunt their prey and ghostly spirits lurk. Steel your nerves and grip your trusty rifle in anticipation of the horrors that await you. It's time to help a broken society decide its fate in one last desperate attempt at redemption.

SynopsisOn the edge of known space, entire human colonies have vanished. Once again Commander Shepard must step in, this time to repel the alien abductors, but he can't do it alone. Shepard calls on Cerberus, a ruthless organization dedicated to human survival at all costs. Faced with a common enemy, Shepard and Cerberus unite, assembling an elite squad of fighters from throughout the galaxy. As they board the most powerful ship ever built, this newly formed crew carries with it the hopes of every last human. With this game guide, you hold the secrets to ensuring their survival.  Prima Games' official strategy guide to Mass Effect 2 takes you deep into the fight for human survival with complete walkthroughs for the main storyline and side quests. With 432 pages of strategy, maps and more, this guide will give you the leg up on the alien abductors that are threatening to destroy humanity as we know it. Don't miss a single credit or upgrade, thanks to the fully labeled maps for every area. This guide also covers downloadable content add-ons so you can truly immerse yourself in this terrifying world where humanity is at the brink of extinction and the only thing that's stopping it is you.

SynopsisWhether you want to learn with your favorite axe from the closet, a guitar sitting in your attic or one that's displayed in the store window down the street, Rocksmith is the first and only music game where you can plug in an actual, real guitar. There's nothing plastic or fake about this gameplay experience. Grab your pick and the guitar to start developing authentic skills and learning real styles while playing tunes from an amazing library of songs. From skilled musicians to those who have never picked up a guitar, Rocksmith delivers an engaging and innovative experience that gets you ready for the stage.  As long as your guitar has a jack, you can play it with Rocksmith on your PC. Featuring a unique 1/4"-to-USB cable, Rocksmith lets you plug any real guitar or bass guitar with a 1/4" jack directly into your computer. Designed exclusively for Rocksmith, this innovative 11.25' cable converts your guitar's signal from analog to digital so it can be recognized and played on your PC. Boasting dozens of difficulty levels, Rocksmith automatically adjusts to your personal ability, allowing you to progress from plucking single notes to strumming complex chords without becoming overwhelmed. You can even improve your bass skills, including two-finger plucking, slapping and popping, with challenges, tutorials and mini games. Play some of your favorite songs from different genres and artists, including The Rolling Stones, The Black Keys, Nirvana, Radiohead and more, and learn to play them from memory when you're challenged to step away from the on-screen notes. You'll be ready for the limelight in no time.

SynopsisWhen the end of the world has come and the Earth lies scorched, who will rise above it all to protect the innocent? A nuclear holocaust has decimated civilization and left a bleak future in its wake. In the aftermath of this apocalypse, bands of survivors join together, wondering what kind of life lies ahead. Little do they know just how fearsome reality can be. With paltry resources and even smaller hopes, humankind tries to rebuild, but finds life forever changed by roaming gangs that value nothing but violence. One man rises above the destruction to protect humanity and resurrect hope for the future. Inheriting expert martial arts skills from his predecessor, the legendary assassin Hokuto Shinken, this man is on a mission of righteousness. Join Kenshiro, a man of seven scars and immeasurable bravery, on a campaign to annihilate evil.  With an indomitable spirit and the will to protect the innocent, Kenshiro is ready for anything. Fist of the North Star: Ken's Rage allows you to step into the shoes of a martial arts master as you fight for the future of humanity. Decimate gangs of roving bandits with expert moves and furious special attacks you've learned from the ultimate artist of assassination, Hokuto Shinken. As you progress further into the game you can unlock hidden characters such as Mamiya and Rei as well as blistering finishing attacks. Discover devastating moves that can cause enemies to explode in a shower of gore or use the destructive and interactive environments to your advantage. When facing dozens of enemies at once, you'll take any help you can get. Be sure to employ a building or object nearby to its utmost advantage as you pummel, maim and crush your opponents. As the hero of civilization, it's up to you to destroy these evil bandits. Are you up to the challenge?

SynopsisThe stadium swallows you with color and movement as players blaze down the field in pursuit of the ball. MediaRecover is a versatile recovery program that recovers lost photos and audio, video and multimedia files from removable media used in digital cameras, PDAs, cellular phones and more. The program supports common media types, such as SmartMedia, CompactFlash, Memory Stick, MicroDrive, xD Picture card, Flash card, PC card, Multimedia card, Secure Digital card, Zip disks, floppy disks, hard drives and more.  MediaRecover can retrieve lost and accidentally deleted data, even if the media has become corrupted. Images can be recovered in a host of files, including JPEG, EXIF, TIFF, PNG, GIF, BMP, RAW images, Canon CRW, Nikon NEF, Kodak DCR and more, as well as audio/video clips such as AVI, MOV and MPG/MPEG. In three easy steps, you can quickly recover files.
