Strap on your flak jacket and take to the skies in classic planes like the Sopwith Camel, Messerschmitt BF 109 and Spitfire, and push the limits of top-secret prototypes, including the Bolchowitinow BI-3, Gloster Meteor fighter jets, and the Horten H IX. In between your spine-tingling missions, use the upgrade system to tune your aircraft to best match your style of play and mission requirements. View your targets on realistic maps that feature cities like Berlin, Belgrade, Slovakia and Tobruk. With accessible arcade controls, Air Conflicts lets rookies earn their wings, while veteran aces can switch to simulation-style controls for a more realistic flying experience. SynopsisFor Max Payne, the tragedies that took his loved ones years ago are wounds that refuse to heal. No longer a cop, close to washed up and addicted to pain killers, Max takes a job in São Paulo, Brazil, protecting the family of wealthy real estate mogul Rodrigo Branco, in an effort to finally escape his troubled past. But as events spiral out of his control, Max Payne finds himself alone on the streets of an unfamiliar city, desperately searching for the truth and fighting for a way out.     Featuring cutting-edge shooting mechanics for precision gunplay, advanced new Bullet Time and Shootdodge effects, full integration of Natural Motion's Euphoria Character Behavior system for lifelike movement and a dark and twisted story, Max Payne 3 is a seamless, highly detailed, cinematic experience from Rockstar Games. In addition to an expansive single-player campaign, Max Payne 3 will also be the first entry in the series to introduce a thorough and engrossing multiplayer experience. Max Payne 3 multiplayer brings the same cinematic feel, fluid gunplay and sense of movement of the single-player game into the realm of online multiplayer. Using the fiction and signature gameplay elements of the Max Payne universe, Max Payne 3 features a wide range of new and traditional multiplayer modes that play on the themes of paranoia, betrayal and heroism, all delivered with the same epic visual style of the single-player game. The Max Payne 3: Special Edition is ideal for fans and players looking for premium and collectible Max Payne content, including digital character and weapon packs not found anywhere else. The contents of the Max Payne 3: Special Edition will be available until April 2, 2012 (while supplies last).

SynopsisIn the lawless West, nowhere is safe. Between rebellious outlaws, crooked government and of course, the zombie hordes, it seems that a frontiersman just can't catch a break. Once again, that rugged former outlaw, John Marston, finds himself caught in the action and fighting for survival  only this time, he's not just up against the bad guys, he'll have to take down the dead guys, too.  Red Dead Redemption: Undead Nightmare propels you back to the American West with a terrifying new twist. Arm yourself with powerful new Tomahawk and Explosive Rifle, venture into the graveyard and return to the role of John Marston as he faces dangerous, decaying enemies from four grotesque zombie classes and even undead and mythological animals. The corpse-conquering mayhem is monstrously intense in online multiplayer action that teams you up with or pits you against friends in Land Grab and Stronghold modes, as well as a variety of challenges, including Poker, Liar's Dice and Horse Racing. SynopsisThe world of Gothicus is overrun with evil. Hordes of devious creatures run amok throughout the land, and the despotic Queen rules the realm with an iron will. Her ambitions are to destroy the gothic universe, while evil envelops everything around you. It's up to you and your team of heroes to put an end to her nightmarish aspirations. Are you up for the adventure?  Embark on a thrilling adventure in the first action RPG for the PlayStation Vita, Dungeon Hunter Alliance. Drop into a dangerous quest to fight back against evil and put an end to the destructive goals of a tyrannical queen  who just happens to be your former flame. Immersing you in a unique online multiplayer gameplay experience, Dungeon Hunter Alliance allows you to team up with three other heroes or go it alone in more than 30 levels. Put your skills to the test in the main quest and numerous side quests while exploring the world of Gothicus. Explore more than 20 unique realms, and create new ones while you play thanks to a dynamic dungeon-creation system. Take advantage of the PlayStation Vita's unique front touch panel controls to pick up weapons and zoom. Use the back touch panel to perform spells. Collect armor and weapons throughout your adventure that you can use to customize your hero. Push evil back in its place, and test your wits in the face of destruction in Dungeon Hunter Alliance.

SynopsisFor more than a thousand years, the myth of Thor's hammer has persisted. According to the legend, whoever wields the Norse god's weapon holds the power to smash mountains into valleys  and even to destroy the gods themselves. When Lara Croft's exploration of an ancient ruin on the floor of the Mediterranean Sea yields evidence that the enduring myth is not so mythical after all, she is thrust into a race against time to unravel the secrets behind the stories and prevent the exploitation of a power beyond human imagining. Will she be able to find her way to the truth in time, or will this forgotten power be unleashed and lay waste to all of civilization?  Prepare for an epic adventure in company with the inimitable Lara Croft in Tomb Raider: Underworld. Journey to far-flung corners of the globe to explore ancient mysteries of the underworld, and make the most of your powerful acrobatic abilities to master whatever environment you find yourself in. Seize your courage and apply your cunning to navigate your way through Lara's world, conquering an elaborate multistage puzzle to complete each level. Help the famed adventurer overcome the challenges in her path and get to the heart of the mystery before time runs out and the entire world is forfeit to a terrible power.

TEEN Violence Get a double dose of high-speed fun with this two-pack of PlayStation 2 titles, including Starsky & Hutch and Corvette. Based on the 70's TV show, Starsky & Hutch lets you take Starsky's bright red Ford Torino and head out on the open road. You'll race through Bay City, while Hutch takes aim at criminals with his .357 Magnum and cleans up the crime-ridden streets. Although Starsky's Ford Torino is fun to drive, this isn't a joyride. If your driving and shooting skills don't keep the TV audience on the edge of their sofas, then ratings will plummet, the show will be cancelled and your game will be all over. If you want a little help handling the high-speed thrills, find a partner and let them shoot while you take the wheel.  In Corvette, you'll have a once in a lifetime opportunity to drive more than 120 different Corvette models spanning half a century. With hot upgrades you can optimize your car's engine and suspension and then take it out on the open road to see what it can do. Realistic physics cause your Corvette to behave in a lifelike fashion for an unforgettable driving experience. Choose one of six different characters and take on challenging courses, including an obstacle-laden trip across Route 66 from Chicago to L.A. Finally, step into the special Heritage mode and test drive any stock production Corvette throughout its rich history. Split-screen multiplayer action lets you challenge a friend for even more fast-paced fun.

Years ago, all the animated movies and games featured 2D characters and settings. You and your kids liked them  after all, 2D was all there was, so you didn't know any different. Then animated movies started to sport a new look  a look that was brighter, fuller, richer  in 3D. Now, it seems that all the cute, cuddly characters from your favorite animated movies and video games are in 3D. If only you had some experience with art and animation, you could make your own 3D animations to share with your friends and family. Now, you can create your own 3D animations, and you certainly don't need a degree in art design.  Create your own 3D animated masterpieces, just like popular movies and video games with Poser Debut. Don't worry if you've never taken an art class  read through the software's easy-to-follow, step-by-step project guide to understand the basics of 3D design and animation, and watch training videos and tutorials to sharpen your skills. With a library of more than 70 ready-to-pose 3D characters, you can select from cute cartoon characters, animals, robots and photo-realistic humans to get started on your creation right away. Choose from various cameras and lights to set the scene to your liking. Customize your designs with different articles of clothing, props to build scenes and even prefabricated poses that you can drop right onto your characters. Connect with Content Paradise to gain access to even more tools and accessories. Are you ready to make your Debut in 3D animation?

With ongoing protection and automatic updates, AntiVirus Plus AntiSpyware 2007 gives you the confidence to e-mail, download from the Internet, install media on your hard drive and more, knowing that your computer is immune to the newest outbreaks.  Not only will your PC be safeguarded against corrupted files, it will also be able to fend off spyware, rootkits and other malware designed to invade your privacy and take control of your computer. Once these invisible agents invade your system and trace your online tendencies, you may become the target of a barrage of unwanted promotions that take up space and ultimately stall your system. With AntiVirus Plus AntiSpyware 2007, you can configure the protection you want. Customize prescheduled scans, set up new ones, then change the routine whenever you like. Most threats are handled automatically, and you only receive alerts if problems are found. Even if you delete a file accidentally, AntiVirus Plus AntiSpyware 2007 offers you a way to recover it. SynopsisThe huge new roller coaster looms overhead, casting a shadow on you as you proudly cut the ribbon and allow the park guests to take the first ride on the thrilling new Super Coaster. SynopsisYour eyes spring open, you lunge forward and suddenly you are wide awake, with nothing but the still, eerie night air to greet you. You don't know how long you've slept. You don't know where you are or how you got here. You don't even know who you are. Soon, you discover that you are not alone  you've awoken in a war-torn universe whose citizens are obsessed with a single prize  a Holy Grail that promises to grant the holder's deepest wish. In this dark, night universe, everyone has a motive and anyone could be a deadly foe. You may not understand the battle into which you've suddenly been immersed, but one thing is clear  you must fight to the death if you want to survive, and if you want to learn exactly who you are.  Fate/EXTRA thrusts you headlong into a virtual world rife with destruction, hate, jealousy and imminent danger, as you return to the acclaimed Fate/stay universe for a harrowing new journey. With only an enigmatic Servant to rely on, you'll come across both familiar and unknown characters, some deadly, some friendly, but none of whom you can fully trust. Use tact and intuition to strategize powerful attacks to defeat your enemies, then unleash Special Moves, Magic Spells and Block, Attack and Guard Breaks to emerge victorious. As you progress, plunge deeper into the rich RPG storyline, and re-evaluate everything you thought you knew about loyalty, death, love and what it means to be human. An unknown power altered the course of your past. But only you can determine your Fate.

SynopsisThe legendary Dragon Emperor of China has lain peacefully in his tomb for a great many years. But when Alex O'Connell discovers the tomb, a sequence of events is set in motion that could change the world forever. Ambitious warlord Yang is well-acquainted with the tales of the Emperor and is determined to raise him from the dead. Soon, Yang and the reanimated Emperor are teamed up in a deadly quest to locate the Pool of Eternal Life and restore the Emperor to full power, and thereafter attempt to take over the world. Only the O'Connells can put a stop to this, but they're going to face a variety of dangerous obstacles along the way. Do you have what it takes to overcome ancient threats, unlock hidden treasures and ultimately prevent the evil Dragon Emperor from becoming immortal?  Join Rick and Evy O'Connell, their grown son Alex and other popular characters from the Mummy franchise for heart-pounding action and excitement in The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor. Play as either Rick or Alex as you travel to six exotic locations from the movie, facing terrifying challenges along the way, including reanimated terracotta soldiers, vengeful ancient demigods and a giant fire-breathing dragon. Collect more than a dozen period weapons to protect yourself, including Webley revolvers and Garand rifles, and experience fast-paced action that switches seamlessly between hand-to-hand combat and ranged gunplay. If you manage to survive, eventually you'll face the Dragon Emperor himself in a climactic battle in the Foundation Chamber beneath the Great Wall of China as you attempt to keep the Emperor from crossing the Wall and becoming immortal. Enter the Tomb of the Dragon Emperor and prepare for spectacular action like you can only find in the world of The Mummy.

SynopsisYou have a lot of questions to answer. If you really want to be a millionaire, that is. You've shouted answers at the TV. The challenge, the heart-pounding intensity and the brain-busting fun is leaving New York and heading straight into your living room as everyone's favorite million-dollar game show comes to your Nintendo DS. With 3,000 questions to answer, adding up to more than 20 hours of gameplay, you'll never have to worry about the buzzer cutting you off. SynopsisYour world teeters on the edge of total annihilation. As a Grey Warden, you are among the last of an ancient order of guardians charged for centuries with defending the lands. SynopsisWorld War II changed lives, changed countries and changed history. Young soldiers from America, Britain, Canada and Poland struggled with the fear and fatal force of the Nazi army throughout the greatest conflicts to shock the shores of Europe. It was a time when the world held its breath as tyranny was confronted. Bravery was tested, tactical expertise meant the difference between life and death, and battle was often up close and personal. Bold heroes were needed as nations fell under the shadow of death. Step back into that world, if you dare, and see how you would perform in this time of crisis. The Germans are marching toward world domination  will you step up and stop this assault against the free world? Will you answer the Call of Duty?  The Call of Duty War Chest combines all of the adrenaline-infused fury of the award-winning Call of Duty franchise into one extraordinary package for your PC. Relive all the close-quarters combat, environmental physics and enemy takedowns from the original Call of Duty, the expansion United Offensive and Call of Duty 2. Vivid graphics immerse you into a realistic world, where special tactics must be employed against your enemy if you expect to forge a path to victory. Intense, team-based multiplayer options let you team up to take down the Nazi forces once and for all. Take a behind-the-scenes look at the progression of this compilation series as it made its way to fruition with the game's developer, and get a historical account of the assault on Pointe du Hoc, a turning point in the Normandy invasion, appropriately titled, "Rangers Lead the Way."

SynopsisBorderlands 2 furthers the distinct blending of First-Person Shooter and Role-Playing genres to create the true evolution of the Role-Playing Shooter. Borderlands 2 features a new visually stunning array of procedurally generated guns, shields, grenades, artifacts, enemies and more. Choose one of the four new character classes to be taken through a carefully crafted and connected story to all-new and surprising environments across the living planet of Pandora. SynopsisIn Crazy Monkeyz, you'll have all the fun of owning your own virtual monkey family. Choose from among a variety of fascinating monkey breeds, from small, nimble squirrel monkeys to large, powerful gorillas. Adopt up to three fun and friendly monkeys for your very own and begin cultivating your own adorable monkey family.  Remember to be responsible and care for your monkeys like you would real animals. Ensure they grow up happy, healthy and energetic by treating them well and molding their personalities. Use rewards and discipline to help them get along with other monkeys, and breed or cross-breed them to create unique monkey families, allowing you to play with up to 10 charming monkeys at one time.

TEEN Language, ViolenceThere was a time when evil ruled the streets of Gotham City, when such notorious criminals as Ra's Al Ghul, Carmine Falcone and the Scarecrow were able to operate freely. That all changed the day one man, driven by tragedy and loss, at last stood ready to begin his war on crime. Based on the film of the same title, you can now aid in the Dark Knight's emergence as Gotham City's protector. Use strength, intellect, high-tech gadgets, stealth and fear to flush evil-doers from the shadows and bring them to justice. Become a true super-hero and live the dream of being the Caped Crusader.  Batman Begins finds the Dark Knight traveling from the halls of Arkham Asylum to the alleys of Gotham City to an ancient monastery high in the Himalayas. Scale buildings, glide between rooftops, trigger explosions and turn enemies against each other by attacking from the shadows to raise their fear levels. Interactive environments let you explore Gotham City as both Batman and his alter-ego, Bruce Wayne. When brute force is required, unleash a host of martial arts attacks and devastating finishing moves to take fiends down. You can also rely on your trusty utility belt, loaded with such crime-fighting gadgets as the Batgrapple, Batarang, optic cables and lock picks to bail you out of tough spots. Tear up the streets in the Batmobile to fight crime in intense vehicular combat before driving back to the Batcave to strategize your next move. Experience the exciting world of the Batman Begins movie and become the greatest scourge that crime has ever seen.

Now there's a way back with GoBack. GoBack 3 Deluxe delivers quick and easy system recovery, providing award-winning protection to Windows PCs. It gives you the power to immediately restore healthy system configurations and lost or damaged data on your own in seconds. GoBack protects you from system crashes, virus damage, failed software installations and even user error, by letting you easily return to a time when your computer worked.  Once installed, GoBack works transparently and continuously, tracking every move you make that affects your hard drive. You can retrieve specific files or restore your entire hard disk, freeing you from the hassles and headaches associated with recovering from common PC problems. The program is also ideal for system administrators and computer lab managers responsible for public-access PCs. Imagine automatically rescuing computers crippled by a daily parade of end users, without having to determine what went wrong. No more need to constantly restore printer settings, remove unwanted files and applications or re-image computers. With GoBack 3 Deluxe, you can dramatically reduce PC downtime, service calls and technical support costs, as well as eliminate the hours spent reloading software on computers that fail for unknown reasons. And, it's as easy as 1-2-3.

SynopsisThe complete darkness is agonizing. All that reminds you you're conscious is the cool puddles of sweat in your palms and the indistinguishable chatter of hundreds of headbangers ready to hang on your every move. You flex your fingers, hopelessly begging for blood to keep flowing to them. Years of practice and determination have come down to this. You were told to cut your moppy hair every Sunday for six years. They said you weren't good enough. But now, nothing stands between you and your dream. The spotlight comes up, bathing you in blinding light. A collage of silhouettes erupt as your drummer counts down. This is your one chance  it's time to rock out or cop out. Are you ready to take your first step toward rock-and-roll superstardom? When the lights come up, will you be signing autographs or unemployment papers?  Transform your living room into a bright stage and yourself into a rock god or goddess with Guitar Hero. Reach rock royalty status, become a legend and shred up your favorite songs until the sun comes up. Jump into a world where your best friends are groupies and roadies, take on a rock personality  whether it's a metalhead or a classic rocker and build a career as a working rock musician. The real kick is in the gameplay, which incorporates a guitar-shaped controller for added realism (not included). Play along with more than 30 awesome rock tunes from some of the greatest bands in history. Four difficulty levels test your skills and six venues place you before increasingly larger audiences. Air guitar is for airheads. Take the next step and experience life as a rock legend.

SynopsisYou stand at the threshold of a new era. Anything is possible. Before your very eyes, the world could become enmeshed in bloody conflict and brutal violence or thrive and prosper in peaceful cooperation and diplomacy. It could be an age of technological progress or of debilitating debt. One thing is certain: you will be at the center of this new era. As leader, all of humanity will look to you to carry them into the future. Will you bear the responsibility of Civilization?  Return to the seat of power in Civilization V as you continue your epic, era-stretching mission to establish a perfect society. The award-winning, strategy-centered gameplay that has become the addiction of World Ruler hopefuls around the globe is now brimming with stunning downloadable content and bonus features as part of the celebratory Game of the Year Edition. Enhance soft or distant sounds with this personal sound amplifier that features 14 bands and channels, noise reduction circuitry and antiwhistle technology for clear sound. Manual volume control allows customized use.  Personal Sound Amplification Products (PSAPs), or sound amplifiers, increase environmental sounds for non-hearing impaired consumers. Examples of situations when these products would be used include hunting (listening for prey), bird watching, listening to a lecture with a distant speaker, and listening to soft sounds that would be difficult for normal hearing individuals to hear (e.g., distant conversations, performances). PSAPs are not intended to amplify speech or environmental sound for individuals with impaired hearing or to compensate for hearing impairment.  Because PSAPs are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or mitigate disease and do not alter the structure or function of the body, they are not devices as defined in the Food, Drug and Cosmetic Act. As such, there is no regulatory classification, product code, or definition for these products.

SynopsisThe Eastern Front contained some of the harshest environments of World War II. Find yourself directly in the heat of the battle in Red Orchestra: Ostfront 41-45, where you must rely on your bayonet in close-quarters combat and the massive 122mm cannon on the Soviet IS-2. Uniquely set as a first-person shooter on the WWII Russian front, this game challenges you to survive through intense combat while fighting for your very life. Experience the difficult conditions that Soviet and German soldiers went through and engage the enemy at all costs.  Join the infantry in Red Orchestra: Ostfront 41-45 and get ready to go to battle in realistic environments on the Eastern Front, including city centers and deeply rural settings. Use a wide range of infantry weapons or command an armored combat vehicle and start blasting. When it seems like all hope is lost or you're ready to shake the enemy loose, find an officer and a radio so you can call in thunderous artillery strikes. The distance-based sound system, along with authentic immersive sound effects and the 3D positional sound system create realistic audio that will make you feel as though you're really in the fight. True-to-life sounds coupled with the 3D Iron Sights and 3D scope system ensure this is one battle that won't just feel like a game. This relatively unexplored but fascinating theater of World War II will open your eyes to the bravery and sacrifice found on this unforgiving stretch of land.

SynopsisReturn for another helping of confectionary fun in Cake Mania 2. Your favorite cake-making aficionado, Jill, returns after sending her grandparents on a luxurious Hawaiian getaway. Now Jill must re-open her bakery in her most challenging role yet. Customizable stores, quirky customers and a slew of store locations are sure to make Jill one busy baker. Help this hardworking entrepreneur build an even more successful enterprise than before. With six different endings and multiple story lines, you'll be on the edge of your seat waiting to see how the adventure unfolds.  Jill's depending on you to make her dreams of success come true, so don't let her down. Dish out all the skill and strategy you can spare throughout 200 challenging levels. Equip your kitchen with 50 unique upgrades so you'll be prepared as the orders pour in. Help Jill satisfy 18 brand-new customers with varying occupations and outrageous demands. Combine 10 delicious cake styles with six tantalizing frosting types to come up with all-new mouth-watering creations. Apply eight crazy cake toppers to earn extra cash, and see how long you can cook in the Endless Baking mode. Can you keep calm and get Jill through the whole dramatic story?

EVERYONE No Descriptors Folks, your next stop is Snoodville. You have to hurry. Snoods are colorful little creatures that can cause all sorts of trouble. You never want to leave a Snood alone. On the other hand, when they meet up with three of their own color, things really start to get crazy. They seem to either fall to the floor or disappear completely. What do you do then? Try firing the grappling hook. The Snoods won't mind. Don't forget to hurry.  Snood 2: On Vacation brings a new style to the classic puzzle game. Classic Snood features time limits and various play modes that will push your skills to the limit. In Circular Snood, you have to deal with the kinetic challenges of a circular environment while firing the colorful little creatures up to high levels. Just when you think the game is over, the whole world rotates and you're back to square one. Snood 2 is entertaining puzzle fun that's perfect for the whole family.

SynopsisJoin a lovable robot and his floating mechanized companion on an incredible adventure based on the Disney/PIXAR movie. WALL-E is filled with plenty of outer-space action as well as tons of strategy and fun. Humankind has abandoned Earth, leaving WALL-E (Waste Allocation Load Lifter Earth-Class) and the search robot EVE all alone. When EVE embarks on a journey to find the humans, WALL-E follows her into the depths of space. What happens next is an exciting tale of courage that determines the fate of the entire planet.  Make your way through nine imaginative worlds where you'll meet all sorts of robots and characters. But watch out  some of them aren't so friendly. Fight when you must, then make a hasty getaway in the Axiom space cruiser. You'll also need to figure out tricky puzzles and navigational challenges throughout the expansive galaxy. Up to four friends can experience the excitement together in multiplayer adventures. Team up with this automated pair and help WALL-E and EVE complete the most important missions in the universe.

EVERYONE Cartoon Violence, Comic Mischief, Use of Tobacco     A gaggle of evil Plobs has just invaded Boingburg, the capital city of the kingdom of Slimenia. Overpowered by the Plobs' relentless force, the slimes, innocent inhabitants of a once-peaceful land, have been cruelly kidnapped. As the last slime standing, Rocket must sludge through Slimenia to save his friends and salvage his homeland. And so, the saga of the Dragon Quest Heroes slithers on.  Assuming the role of Rocket, the resolute hero, you must stretch, bounce, transport things on your head and unleash your Elasto Blast assault as only a slime can. Collect items, money and monsters while rescuing your fellow slimes as you solve the adventure stages. Think you can do it all on foot? Think again, slimy. Hop aboard your fully customizable Schliemann tank and go slime for slime with enemy monster tanks by shooting yourself or the slimes you set free from the cannons.

SynopsisGet your fill of adventure from a galaxy far, far away with the Empire at War Gold Pack. This pack includes Star Wars: Empire at War, the Forces of Corruption expansion pack and much more. In Empire at War, experience the creation of the Rebel Alliance, the strengthening of the Empire and the beginnings of the Galactic Civil War. Will you fight for the forces of good alongside Obi-Wan Kenobi, or will you succumb to the Dark Side and accept Darth Vader as your lord and master? In the Forces of Corruption expansion pack, play the role of diabolical criminal genius Tyber Zahn as he attempts to take over the galaxy after the destruction of the Death Star. Gain control of the underworld by stealing funds, spying, spreading influence and fighting, leading up to your ultimate goal of hijacking a Super Star Destroyer.  Both sagas feature the ships, weapons and fearsome characters that have brought the series such legendary status. The excitement doesn't end there: the Gold Pack also includes goodies not available with separate versions of the games. The included Prima hint book provides tips and tricks to help you gain the advantage when engaging in space battles. There are also five bonus maps for making your way around the galaxy, as well as wallpapers, screen savers and concept art from the collector's edition. Fans of the series will enjoy the action and extras included in this Gold Pack.

SynopsisThe people of your island continent grow weary after famine and war ravage the land. An impassible veil has defeated all hope of escape, leaving you and your countrymen struggling to survive. Only little fertile land remains to support the population, causing violent rivalries. To make matters worse, fierce and powerful monsters called Screapers pose a constant threat and come closer to the cities with each passing day. It will take all your strength to overcome these odds to save your island and its forsaken inhabitants.  This is the life you've inherited in Growlanswer: Heritage of War. Unfortunately, system failure is a basic reality of owning and operating a PC. Sooner or later, you will encounter a serious problem with your system where you may stand to lose a great deal of information and vital files. The best way to deal with this is to be prepared and Norton Ghost 10.0 is the key to that preparation. The program will help you save everything you care about in your computer, from music to pictures to tax information. Your files will be backed up and recovered automatically and you will enjoy easy restoration from system failures.  Full-system backup allows you to create an image of everything on you computer without restarting or exiting Windows. The hard-drive space needed for backup is automatically managed and you will be warned when the drive is nearing capacity. Norton Ghost is flexible, utilizing the familiar Windows-user interface to restore an image, file or folder. The ability to perform incremental backups saves time and disk space. The one-button "Back Up Now" feature immediately begins a new recovery point, while Best-Practice Storage Detection automatically determines which drives are optimal for recovery.

SynopsisA century and a half into the future, the American landscape looks very different from what it is today. Ecological and seismological upheaval have wreaked havoc on the continent, literally splitting the nation in two. The central U.S. has disappeared. The federal government has failed, leaving the two remaining halves to fend for themselves. The Eastern states, now known as the Atlantic Alliance, have formed a partnership with Europe and are focused on advancing cybernetic technology to survive in this strange new world. The Western states, now called the Republic of Pacifica, have formed an alliance with Asia, and through genetic advancements they are restructuring their inhabitants' DNA. The two regions remain locked in a tense sort of peace until 2161, when rumors of unauthorized military preparation in Pacifica lead the newly restored President to order a strike in the heart of Pacifican territory. Now the two sides are engaged in a brutal war with global implications. In the world of the not-so-distant future, who will triumph in an epic conflict where technology is pitted against genetics?  In the stunning, all-too-possible world of Fracture, you play as Jet Brody, a demolitions expert with the Atlantic Alliance Army. Wield explosive, terrain-deforming weaponry that doesn't just destroy, but actually transforms the battlefield to your advantage. But be careful, for the genetic enhancements wrought by the Republic of Pacifica have given its soldiers extraordinary, superhuman powers. Experience heart-pounding excitement as you stride onto the battlefields of the future and take part in a devastating conflict whose roots lie in ethical quandaries that face our society even today.

SynopsisAn agile, web-spinning hero swings nimbly through the canyonesque streets of Manhattan. But the formerly gleaming city is no longer what it was. As he battles against the ominous alien invasion, will he choose the grace and speed of Spidey's traditional Red Suit and align himself with other great heroes? Or will he heed the siren's call of the Black Suit and all the sinister power it provides, thus choosing the path of the vigilante instead?  In Spider-Man: Web of Shadows, you'll encounter a city and a hero with greater depth than ever before in a Spider-Man game. SynopsisIn the far reaches of space, the USG Ishimura, an immense mining ship, encounters a mysterious alien artifact. For reasons nobody back on Earth understands, the ship's communications are cut off abruptly. On the assumption that it is a mere technical glitch, engineer Isaac Clarke is dispatched to the scene to repair the ship's communications array. But instead of an equipment snafu, what Clarke finds is a scene of horror beyond his imagination. The ship is a floating bloodbath, its crew mutilated and infected by a terrifying alien force. Now Clarke is engaged in a fierce battle for his own survival. Will he be able to escape with his own life and limbs intact, or is he doomed to become the alien scourge's next victim?  Travel to a remote star system for heart-stopping terror in Dead Space. Intricately rendered graphics draw you into the nightmarish deep-space carnage, made all the more horrific by the game's wrenchingly scary pace and panic-inducing audio. Experience terror in zero-gravity as you battle against relentless enemies bent on your mutilation. Fight back with a campaign of strategic dismemberment, wielding powerful weapons to shear off limbs and neutralize the enemy. Ward off the attacking hordes and get to the heart of the Ishimura's terrible mystery so that the artifact can be returned to its home planet before the alien menace expands its campaign of destruction.

SynopsisLast lap. You're in second place. You've been behind this guy for too long and you're ready to make your move  you haven't come this far to walk away with silver. With the finish line up ahead, you slide into position, just behind the lead driver. Coming around the last turn, he comes up short and you pounce on the opportunity. At just the right moment, you throttle your racing machine and blow by your helpless opponent. First place is all yours. You can breathe easier now and enjoy the ride  it's the victory lap.  Get ready for a NASCAR experience like no other. Test your mettle on classic speedways, including Daytona International Speedway, Chicagoland Speedway, Homestead-Miami Speedway, Martinsville Speedway and Talladega Superspeedway. Jeff Gordon, Dale Earnhardt, Jr., Kyle Busch, Joey Logano and the other NASCAR racers may be kings of the oval track, but in Unleashed, you'll get to see how good their driving skills really are as you crash through the boundaries and bring the racing action to the streets, beaches and off-road environments of the cities that surround the familiar tracks. With lax physics rules and virtually no limits, all you've got to worry about is bumping and grinding your way into first place. Slick audio, intense visuals and easily accessible gameplay let racers of all ages and skill levels enjoy the high-octane adventure and master techniques like drafting and sling-shotting. Start your engines.

SynopsisOnly a few short years into the future, the world has reached a crisis point. In 2016, a nuclear exchange in the Middle East crippled the world's oil supply, sending crude oil prices soaring to $800 a barrel. In the aftermath, Russia stepped in to fill the void and experienced a massive economic boom as a result, regaining its superpower status. Western Europe, too, has achieved superpower status after banding together to form the European Federation. Now, in 2020, the European Federation has withdrawn from NATO to protest the United States' construction of an orbital military platform. Tensions are rising between the U.S., Europe and Russia, and the years-long military stalemate among the three is about to come to an explosive end.  Tom Clancy's EndWar thrusts you into the center of a massive world war. Experience the devastating and all-too-real consequences as World War III erupts, pitting superpower against superpower in a world not far removed from our own. Prepare for fierce battles, epic destruction and stunning shows of military might. Will this be the world war to end all wars  or the war that ends the world?

SynopsisIt's game seven, tie game and there are only eight seconds remaining on the clock. Your teammate inbounds the ball to you, and you start to dribble up the floor crossing midcourt. Quickly you cross over and head to the left as the center sets a hard pick  knocking your defender off his feet. Seven seconds to go. You pass to the wing and cut to the right. Seconds continue to tick away as the forward comes up to set a screen. Your defender recovers and rushes up to cover you just as you receive the ball at the top of the three-point arc. You pump fake  he doesn't budge. You decide to put the ball on the deck and dribble to the right  three seconds to go. You stop and cross over to your left, causing the defender to lose his balance. You rise into the air and release the ball. Two seconds  flashbulbs pop and the crowd holds its collective breath. One second  the ball approaches the hoop, will there be overtime or glory?  NBA 2K11 builds on the momentum of NBA 2K10 by improving every aspect of the series. In addition to the authentic professional basketball experience, NBA 2K11 pays homage to 14-time NBA All-Star and six-time NBA World Champion, Michael Jordan. Not only will His Airness be gracing the cover of NBA 2K11, players will be able to step into the virtual shoes of the living legend and soar from the foul line to slam it home. Is your star center looking a little sluggish on the court? He better take a breather on the bench  players' stamina and energy now affects how fast they can run up the court and how long they can maintain their burst of speed. Enjoy a more realistic NBA experience with even more Player Signature Styles. My Player mode lets you create your own NBA player and guide his every career move as he attends the Summer Circuit, training camps and goes through the ranks of the NBA on his quest to become a legend. Capitalize on the latest off-season's big trade, free agent moves and ratings adjustments with updated rosters. Use Michael Jordan as your player while you learn and master both the basic and the advanced moves in NBA 2K11 in the step-by-step tutorial mode. Dunk, block, shoot, steal and unleash ankle-breaking moves against your friends in head-to-head online play via ad-hoc wireless connectivity. With new and improved features, NBA 2K11 delivers all the realism, excitement and energy of the NBA.

These horrible creatures have been unleashed on the Internet and it's up to Mega Man and his friend Lan to stop them from destroying the cyber world forever. SynopsisSlick up your hair, put on your poodle skirt and slide into a cool T-Bird or Pink Ladies jacket and twist, jive and shout your way back to the 1950s high school halls in Grease. Let loose on the bleachers while you belt showstoppers with your buddies. Put your pedal to the metal as you race the Scorpions on a thrilling race for legacy and love at Rydell High. Party your heart out in a spunky sleepover with the Pink Ladies. The beloved movie musical that made Grease the word for generation after generation comes to life in your living room as you power up your Wii  and this time, you're the star.  You'll rule the school when you rock out to 15 classic hits with Sandy and Danny in Grease. Croon "Beauty School Dropout" in a fantasy dream world, heat up the school carnival in "You're the One that I Want" and bring back '50s-style jive moves to really rock Rydell. High school wouldn't be complete without your Pink Ladies or T-Birds getting your back  team up with your crew in eight-player multiplayer games and vie to achieve Rydell royalty status. As 12 favorite movie scenes  from the thrilling race to Frenchie's slumber party  come back to life, you'll take center stage and show that you're automatic, systematic, hydromatic  why, you're Greased lightning.

Continue your Neverwinter Nights adventure with the expansion pack The Shadows of Undrentide. You'll get all-new prestige classes, monsters, weapons, feats, skills and spells. More than a dozen new monsters will keep you on your toes and you'll instill mind-melting terror in your enemies with more than 50 new powerful spells. Three new tilesets, including desert, ruins and snowy terrain provide more options than ever and you can construct the plot with projectile traps and nonplayer character conversations.

SynopsisEvil forces are present, and it's up to Goku and the Z warriors to sacrifice their own safety in an attempt to bring peace and stability to the people of Earth. SynopsisForget the high life. Buck up, gear up and prove you have the guts to live the low life  deep in the underground world of crime, action and hedonistic pleasures in Tokyo, Japan. In this rogue game where there are no rules, women, nightlife, fighting and luxury combine in one gritty adventure that will keep you coming down for more.  Hit the seedy streets of Tokyo in Yakuza 4, where you'll play as one of four men entangled in a murderous plot. As you take on challengers in fierce street fights, chase cars through the winding city roads and seek pleasure in the backdoor establishments, you'll discover how good it is to be bad. Unwind after a hard day of crime with a visit to Japan's best hostess bars, karaoke pickup bars, massage parlors and pachinko palaces, where you'll be the new king of the nightlife. Get your game on in video arcades, batting cages and pool, dart and blackjack challenges, and see if you can't earn a little extra glory while you're at it. Do you have what it takes to live low in the city of sin?

SynopsisYour opponent's ball flies narrowly past the pallino, leaving you a clear opening to become the bocce champion. You take a deep breath before releasing the ball; it sails over the grass. Either way, there are lots of laughs in store.  Design your Sims' abode and furniture, craft the tools they will use to survive and scrounge up some clothes for them to wear. Hunt animals, gather food and prepare meals to sustain your hardworking Sims in their new environment. Decode a treasure map and stumble upon items that can help your Sims in their daily lives on the island. Trek through new territories, such as beaches, caves, lagoons and other areas. The characters' behaviors will change as they learn to cope with their new world, creating a gameplay experience that's almost as real as life itself.

SynopsisYou've sat warm and comfortable on your couch and watched people onscreen fight for their lives after being pitted against the forces of Mother Nature. They captivated you, and even made you think for a second of what it'd be like to have to rely on only the clothes on your back to make your way out of an extreme environment. "Eh, it wouldn't be that bad," you've thought, going for another handful of popcorn and pulling the blanket closer, "I could do it." Think again.  In Cabela's Survival: Shadows of Katmai, you might end up eating your words  because the food is few and far between in the Alaskan wilderness. Your plane has crash landed in the middle of one of the most extreme environments on the planet, and you must face the unforgiving forces of nature. Rely on your wits, skill and endurance against the merciless cold, impossible terrain and ever-present threat of starvation. See if you can make it out alive as you encounter some of the world's most deadly predators. Be the last one standing in thrilling shooting galleries, boss face-offs, melee combat and an exciting mix of first- and third-person combat. You can click your heels all you want, but Kansas is a long way off  and you'd better get moving because there's a pack of ravenous beasts hot on your trail.
